items.title: I went down a rabbit hole with @midjourney v8 and ended gener...
items.summary: I went down a rabbit hole with @midjourney v8 and ended generating an entirely new film update for the first film I e...
items.content: I went down a rabbit hole with @midjourney v8 and ended generating an entirely new film update for the first film I ever made in AI.. ECLIPTIC. I need to animate it in @capcutapp @dreamina_ai Seedance and then it’s ready! Luckily I already wrote this so it was kinda fun only focusing on the visuals for a change, I am in absolute love with how it turned out! I can’t wait to put this together for you guys to see this week. ❤️🎥 been a minute since I did something strictly sci-fi so although everyone might be burned out from it.. this story is f^cking epic and I think you’ll like it 😉
items.contentChinese: 我在 @midjourney v8 里越陷越深，最后给我用 AI 做的第一部电影——ECLIPTIC——整出了一版全新的更新。我还得在 @capcutapp @dreamina_ai Seedance 里给它做动画，然后就准备好了！幸运的是，我早就把它写好了，所以这次只专注视觉还挺好玩的，我完全爱上了最后的效果！我已经等不及把它剪好，让你们这周就能看到。❤️🎥 好久没做纯科幻了，所以虽然大家可能已经对它有点审美疲劳了.. 这个故事真他妈史诗级，我觉得你们会喜欢的 😉
items.contentEnglish: I went down a rabbit hole with @midjourney v8 and ended generating an entirely new film update for the first film I ever made in AI.. ECLIPTIC. I need to animate it in @capcutapp @dreamina_ai Seedance and then it’s ready! Luckily I already wrote this so it was kinda fun only focusing on the visuals for a change, I am in absolute love with how it turned out! I can’t wait to put this together for you guys to see this week. ❤️🎥 been a minute since I did something strictly sci-fi so although everyone might be burned out from it.. this story is f^cking epic and I think you’ll like it 😉

items.title: I think I am getting grip on how to work with @midjourney V8.
items.summary: I think I am getting grip on how to work with @midjourney V8. So many stupendously good images. The prompt understand...
items.content:
I think I am getting grip on how to work with @midjourney V8. 
So many stupendously good images. The prompt understanding is excellent.  
At this point testing out feels addictive and the generation speed is impressive even in relaxed mode. https://t.co/fSEXvhpq9U
items.contentChinese:
我觉得我慢慢掌握了如何使用 @midjourney V8。  
有这么多极其出色的图像。对提示的理解也非常到位。  
现在测试起来让人上瘾，而且即使在休闲模式下，生成速度也很令人印象深刻。 https://t.co/fSEXvhpq9U
items.contentEnglish:
I think I am getting grip on how to work with @midjourney V8.

items.title: Create a highly cinematic, realistic photo of a person using...
items.summary: Create a highly cinematic, realistic photo of a person using the face from the uploaded image. The person is standing...
items.content: Create a highly cinematic, realistic photo of a person using the face from the uploaded image. The person is standing alone under a single streetlight at night in heavy rain. The rain is pouring down dramatically, with visible droplets and water splashing on the ground. The streetlight casts a strong golden glow, lighting only the person while the surroundings fade into darkness. The ground is wet and reflective, creating beautiful reflections of the light. The camera angle is slightly low and centered, giving a powerful, movie-like look. The person is wearing a dark stylish outfit like a long coat or jacket, with water dripping from clothes and hair. Their expression is calm and intense. Cinematic lighting, dramatic contrast, volumetric light rays through rain, ultra realistic photography, Hollywood movie scene, high detail, atmospheric depth.
items.contentChinese: 创建一张高度电影化、超真实的照片，人物使用上传图像中的面部。这个人在夜晚的大雨中独自站在一盏路灯下。雨水戏剧性地倾泻而下，可见雨滴并有水花在地面溅起。路灯投射出强烈的金色光晕，只照亮此人，而周围渐渐消失在黑暗中。地面湿润且具有反光性，形成美丽的灯光倒影。相机角度略低且居中，呈现强烈的电影感。人物穿着深色且时尚的服装，如长大衣或夹克，衣服和头发上有水珠滴落。表情冷静而强烈。电影级照明、戏剧性对比、雨幕中的体积光束、超写实摄影、好莱坞电影场景、高度细节、富有氛围的纵深感。
items.contentEnglish: Create a highly cinematic, realistic photo of a person using the face from the uploaded image. The person is standing alone under a single streetlight at night in heavy rain. The rain is pouring down dramatically, with visible droplets and water splashing on the ground. The streetlight casts a strong golden glow, lighting only the person while the surroundings fade into darkness. The ground is wet and reflective, creating beautiful reflections of the light. The camera angle is slightly low and centered, giving a powerful, movie-like look. The person is wearing a dark stylish outfit like a long coat or jacket, with water dripping from clothes and hair. Their expression is calm and intense. Cinematic lighting, dramatic contrast, volumetric light rays through rain, ultra realistic photography, Hollywood movie scene, high detail, atmospheric depth.

items.summary: { "generation request": { "meta data": { "tool": "NanoBanana Pro", "task type": "minimal dance editorial 9panel grid"...
items.content:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "minimal_dance_editorial_9panel_grid",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.1_NEW_LOOK_NEW_BACKGROUND_NEW_POSES"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "text_to_image",
      "notes": "Create a photoreal 3x3 minimalist dance-fashion editorial grid featuring one adult woman across nine panels. Keep the same woman with strong facial consistency in all panels, but change the styling, background, and poses from the original concept. The visual style should still feel modern, clean, intimate, and movement-driven, but more elevated and visually fresh. She now wears a soft dove-gray or muted taupe fitted asymmetrical dance top paired with fluid high-waisted charcoal wide-leg pants or a refined draped dance-fashion bottom. The outfit should feel sophisticated, minimal, and architectural, with elegant fabric movement and no harness straps. Her hair should remain a chic short dark bob, but styled more polished and softly textured. The background should change to a muted warm-gray or pale stone editorial studio with soft tonal depth instead of pure white. Every panel should show a different expressive dance-inspired pose, with more sculptural body lines, stronger asymmetry, refined curves, floor work, kneeling positions, seated poses, stretched limbs, and elegant off-balance shapes. The result should feel like a high-end contemporary dance fashion editorial, subtle yet visually compelling."
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 3,
        "cols": 3,
        "gutter": "thin",
        "outer_border": "none",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high"
      },
      "render_style": "minimal_editorial_realism",
      "sharpness": "editorial_crisp",
      "grain": "subtle_film",
      "dynamic_range": "soft_clean_natural",
      "color_grade": "stone_gray_editorial"
    },
    "subject": {
      "identity": "one woman with highly consistent facial features across all nine panels",
      "hair": "short polished dark bob with soft natural texture",
      "outfit": "muted dove-gray or taupe asymmetrical fitted dance top with charcoal fluid wide-leg pants or refined draped dance-fashion bottoms",
      "beauty": "clean editorial makeup, softly defined eyes, natural skin texture, understated modern finish"
    },
    "scene": {
      "environment": "muted warm-gray or pale stone studio wall and floor with subtle tonal depth and no clutter",
      "mood": "modern, sculptural, intimate, movement-led, refined, artistic",
      "panel_direction": {
        "panel_1": "low seated pose with one knee bent, one arm trailing across the floor, direct calm gaze",
        "panel_2": "standing asymmetrical pose with one shoulder lifted and both arms forming a sculptural curve around the face",
        "panel_3": "soft side-facing pose with elongated torso, one leg extended, and elegant neck line",
        "panel_4": "floor-based contemporary pose with one arm reaching upward and the other grounded for balance",
        "panel_5": "close seated portrait with one hand resting across the collarbone and a poised expression",
        "panel_6": "standing pose with one arm overhead and the body slightly arched into a refined off-balance line",
        "panel_7": "kneeling pose with the fabric pooling naturally, torso twisted gently, expressive hand placement",
        "panel_8": "elongated diagonal pose with one leg folded under, one arm lifted, and subtle hair motion",
        "panel_9": "cropped fashion-dance pose with hands near the waist and a strong sculptural torso line"
      }
    },
    "camera": {
      "framing": "mixed full body, seated portrait, and mid-body fashion compositions",
      "angle": "clean editorial studio angles",
      "focus": "sharp on face, body lines, fabric movement, and pose structure",
      "depth_of_field": "clean studio clarity"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "soft directional editorial lighting",
      "quality": "gentle sculpting with subtle shadow depth, clean skin tones, and refined shape definition",
      "skin_rendering": "realistic skin texture, no plastic effect"
    },
    "must_have": [
      "3x3 grid layout",
      "one woman across all panels with strong identity consistency",
      "new outfit design",
      "new background setting",
      "new dance-inspired poses",
      "short dark bob hair",
      "modern sculptural movement",
      "minimal high-end editorial feel",
      "photoreal quality",
      "perfect anatomy",
      "realistic hands",
      "physically accurate posture and body balance",
      "sharp face in every panel"
    ],
    "negative_prompt": [
      "different identity in each panel",
      "original white top and black harness outfit",
      "pure white background",
      "same exact poses as before",
      "bright colorful background",
      "glamorous nightclub setting",
      "awkward limbs",
      "bad anatomy",
      "extra fingers",
      "missing fingers",
      "deformed hands",
      "broken wrists",
      "stiff shoulders",
      "unnatural spine",
      "plastic skin",
      "blurry face",
      "duplicate limbs",
      "cartoon",
      "low detail",
      "text",
      "logo",
      "watermark"
    ]
  }
}
items.contentChinese:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "minimal_dance_editorial_9panel_grid",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.1_NEW_LOOK_NEW_BACKGROUND_NEW_POSES"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "text_to_image",
      "notes": "创建一组摄影写实的3x3极简舞蹈时尚编辑格，九格中呈现同一成年女性。在所有格子中保持同一女性且面部高度一致，但在造型、背景和动作上与原始概念有所不同。视觉风格仍应感现代、简洁、亲密并以动作为驱动，但更为高级且视觉上清新。她现在穿着柔和的鸽灰色或低调褐灰色贴身不对称舞蹈上衣，搭配流动感十足的高腰炭灰色阔腿裤或精致垂褶的舞蹈时尚下装。服装应给人精致、极简、具有建筑感的印象，面料运动优雅，不应有束带。她的发型保持时髦的短暗色波波头，但造型更为精致、质感柔和。背景应改为柔和的暖灰或浅石色编辑工作室墙面与地面，具有细腻的色调层次，而非纯白。每格应展示不同的富有表现力的舞蹈启发动作，具有更具雕塑感的身体线条、更强的不对称性、精炼的曲线、地面动作、跪姿、坐姿、拉伸的四肢以及优雅的失衡造型。整体效果应感觉像是高端当代舞蹈时尚编辑，含蓄却视觉上引人注目。"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "纵向",
      "resolution_target": "超高分辨率",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "网格",
        "rows": 3,
        "cols": 3,
        "gutter": "窄",
        "outer_border": "无",
        "panel_consistency": "非常高"
      },
      "render_style": "极简编辑写实风格",
      "sharpness": "编辑级清晰",
      "grain": "细腻胶片颗粒",
      "dynamic_range": "柔和干净自然",
      "color_grade": "石材灰编辑调色"
    },
    "subject": {
      "identity": "在九个格子中面部特征高度一致的同一名女性",
      "hair": "精致的短暗色波波头，质感柔和自然",
      "outfit": "柔和的鸽灰或低调褐灰色不对称贴身舞蹈上衣，搭配流动的高腰炭灰阔腿裤或精致垂褶的舞蹈时尚下装",
      "beauty": "干净的编辑妆容，眼妆柔和有定义，自然的皮肤质感，低调现代的妆感"
    },
    "scene": {
      "environment": "柔和的暖灰或浅石色工作室墙面与地面，具有细腻的色调深度且无杂物",
      "mood": "现代、雕塑感、亲密、以动作为主导、精致、艺术化",
      "panel_direction": {
        "panel_1": "低位坐姿，一膝弯曲，一臂贴地延展，目光直视且平静",
        "panel_2": "站立不对称造型，一侧肩膀上提，双臂在面部周围形成雕塑般的弧线",
        "panel_3": "柔和的侧身姿势，躯干拉长，一条腿延展，颈项线条优雅",
        "panel_4": "地面当代舞姿，一臂向上伸展，另一臂贴地以保持平衡",
        "panel_5": "近距坐姿肖像，一手放在锁骨处，表情端庄自持",
        "panel_6": "站姿，一臂高举，身体微微后弓形成精致的失衡线条",
        "panel_7": "跪姿，面料自然堆叠，躯干轻微扭转，手部姿态富有表现力",
        "panel_8": "拉长的斜线姿势，一腿收于下方，一臂上举，发丝有细微运动感",
        "panel_9": "裁切的时尚舞蹈姿势，双手靠近腰部，躯干呈强烈雕塑线条"
      }
    },
    "camera": {
      "framing": "取景混合全身、坐姿肖像与中身时尚构图",
      "angle": "简洁的编辑工作室角度",
      "focus": "聚焦面部、身体线条、面料动态及姿势结构，清晰锐利",
      "depth_of_field": "清晰的工作室景深"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "柔和的定向编辑灯光",
      "quality": "轻柔雕塑感，阴影层次细腻，肤色干净，形体定义精致",
      "skin_rendering": "真实的皮肤质感，无塑料感"
    },
    "must_have": [
      "3x3 网格布局",
      "所有格子均为同一女性且身份高度一致",
      "新的服装设计",
      "新的背景设置",
      "新的舞蹈启发动作",
      "短暗色波波头发型",
      "现代雕塑感动作",
      "极简高端编辑感",
      "摄影写实品质",
      "完美解剖结构",
      "真实的手部",
      "符合物理的姿势与身体平衡",
      "每格面部清晰锐利"
    ],
    "negative_prompt": [
      "每格不同身份",
      "原始的白色上衣和黑色束带套装",
      "纯白背景",
      "与之前完全相同的动作",
      "明亮多彩背景",
      "华丽的夜店场景",
      "尴尬的四肢",
      "糟糕的解剖结构",
      "多余的手指",
      "缺失手指",
      "畸形的手",
      "断裂的手腕",
      "僵硬的肩膀",
      "不自然的脊柱",
      "塑料感皮肤",
      "模糊的面部",
      "重复的肢体",
      "卡通风",
      "低细节",
      "文字",
      "标志",
      "水印"
    ]
  }
}

items.title: Create an ultra photorealistic cinematic portrait of a man vi...
items.summary: Create an ultra photorealistic cinematic portrait of a man viewed from a slightly low angle looking upward with a con...
items.content:
Create an ultra-photorealistic cinematic portrait of a man viewed from a slightly low angle looking upward with a confident, powerful expression. Generate his face using the uploaded portrait photo. The composition is a tight upper-body portrait with the head tilted slightly upward, emphasizing the jawline and beard structure.
The background is a smooth vibrant studio
gradient transitioning between deep orange and warm red tones, creating a
dramatic modern aesthetic. Use strong cinematic dual-color lighting: warm
red/orange light from one side and cool teal/blue rim lighting from the
opposite side to create striking contrast across the face and beard. The man
is wearing a futuristic white oversized puffer jacket with large quilted sections
and a high protective collar. The jacket should look premium and modern with
realistic fabric folds, padded insulation volume, and subtle material sheen
similar to high-end technical winter fashion. Add extremely detailed textures:
visible skin pores, beard hair strands, subtle facial imperfections, realistic lip
texture, micro skin reflections, and detailed hair follicles. The sunglasses
should have thin metal frames with realistic reflections and slightly tinted
lenses reflecting the colored lighting. The white puffer jacket must show
detailed stitching, fabric grain, padded segments, and realistic light interaction
across the material. Lighting should create soft shadows, strong color
contrast, and dramatic highlights across the face, beard, glasses, and jacket.
Maintain sharp focus on the subject with studio-quality depth and clarity.
Ultra photorealistic portrait photography, cinematic studio lighting, hyper-
detailed textures, 8K detail, premium editorial fashion portrait, extremely
realistic skin and fabric materials.
Add a subtle handwritten text in the bottom-right corner that reads "Created by Naik", elegant fashion-editorial signature style, thin white ink, slightly transparent, like a photographer's signature on a luxury magazine shoot.
items.contentChinese:
创建一幅超写实的电影感人像：以略低的视角向上拍摄一名男性，表情自信、充满力量。  
使用上传的人像照片生成他的面部。  
构图为紧凑的上半身人像，头部略微上仰，强调下颌线和胡须结构。  
背景为平滑且充满活力的工作室渐变，从深橙色过渡到暖红色调，营造戏剧性现代美感。  
使用强烈的电影式双色照明：一侧为暖红/橙色光，另一侧为冷青/蓝色轮廓光，在面部和胡须上形成醒目的对比。  
该男子身着未来感的白色宽大羽绒服，带有大型绗缝区块和高护领。  
羽绒服应呈现高端现代感，具有真实的面料褶皱、填充保暖的体积感，以及类似高端功能性冬季时装的细微光泽。  
加入极其细致的纹理：可见的皮肤毛孔、胡须发丝、细微的面部瑕疵、逼真的唇部纹理、微小的皮肤反光以及详细的毛囊细节。  
太阳镜应为细金属框，具有逼真的反射，并带有微微着色的镜片，能反映彩色光线。  
白色羽绒服必须展示详细的缝线、面料纹理、填充分段以及材料与光线的真实交互。  
灯光应在面部、胡须、眼镜和羽绒服上制造柔和的阴影、强烈的色彩对比和戏剧性的高光。  
保持主体清晰对焦，达到工作室级的景深与清晰度。  
超写实人像摄影、电影级工作室灯光、超细节纹理、8K 细节、高端编辑时尚人像、极其逼真的皮肤与面料材质。  
在右下角添加一行细微的手写文字，内容为 "Created by Naik"，优雅的时尚编辑签名字体，细白色墨水，略透明，像豪华杂志拍摄中的摄影师签名。
items.contentEnglish:
Create an ultra-photorealistic cinematic portrait of a man viewed from a slightly low angle looking upward with a confident, powerful expression. Generate his face using the uploaded portrait photo. The composition is a tight upper-body portrait with the head tilted slightly upward, emphasizing the jawline and beard structure.
The background is a smooth vibrant studio
gradient transitioning between deep orange and warm red tones, creating a
dramatic modern aesthetic. Use strong cinematic dual-color lighting: warm
red/orange light from one side and cool teal/blue rim lighting from the
opposite side to create striking contrast across the face and beard. The man
is wearing a futuristic white oversized puffer jacket with large quilted sections
and a high protective collar. The jacket should look premium and modern with
realistic fabric folds, padded insulation volume, and subtle material sheen
similar to high-end technical winter fashion. Add extremely detailed textures:
visible skin pores, beard hair strands, subtle facial imperfections, realistic lip
texture, micro skin reflections, and detailed hair follicles. The sunglasses
should have thin metal frames with realistic reflections and slightly tinted
lenses reflecting the colored lighting. The white puffer jacket must show
detailed stitching, fabric grain, padded segments, and realistic light interaction
across the material. Lighting should create soft shadows, strong color
contrast, and dramatic highlights across the face, beard, glasses, and jacket.
Maintain sharp focus on the subject with studio-quality depth and clarity.
Ultra photorealistic portrait photography, cinematic studio lighting, hyper-
detailed textures, 8K detail, premium editorial fashion portrait, extremely
realistic skin and fabric materials.
Add a subtle handwritten text in the bottom-right corner that reads "Created by Naik", elegant fashion-editorial signature style, thin white ink, slightly transparent, like a photographer's signature on a luxury magazine shoot.

items.title: A cinematic, high resolution portrait of a young woman with d...
items.summary: A cinematic, high resolution portrait of a young woman with dark hair and soft bangs, leaning her head on her hand in...
items.content: A cinematic, high-resolution portrait of a young woman with dark hair and soft bangs, leaning her head on her hand in a cozy, dimly lit cafe. She is wearing a thick, chunky white cable-knit sweater that fills the lower half of the frame with rich texture. To her left, a large window is covered in a dense pattern of raindrops, with a blurred city street and glowing bokeh lights visible through the glass. The interior is filled with warm, nostalgic lighting, featuring vintage framed posters and a dark wood-paneled wall in the background. In the extreme foreground, an out-of-focus white ceramic cup of coffee sits on a wooden table. The image has a soft film grain, a shallow depth of field, and a quiet, moody, and serene atmosphere.
items.contentChinese: 一幅具有电影感、高分辨率的年轻女性肖像：她有深色的头发和柔和的刘海，把头靠在手上，坐在一个舒适、灯光昏暗的咖啡馆里。她穿着一件厚实的、粗线编织的白色麻花毛衣，以丰富的质感填满画面下半部分。在她的左侧，一扇大窗户布满密集的雨滴，透过玻璃可以看到模糊的城市街道和发光的散景灯光。室内充满温暖怀旧的灯光，背景有复古装框海报和深色木质镶板墙。在最前景处，一只失焦的白色陶瓷咖啡杯放在一张木桌上。画面带有柔和的胶片颗粒感、浅景深，营造出安静、富有情绪感且宁和的氛围。
items.contentEnglish: A cinematic, high-resolution portrait of a young woman with dark hair and soft bangs, leaning her head on her hand in a cozy, dimly lit cafe. She is wearing a thick, chunky white cable-knit sweater that fills the lower half of the frame with rich texture. To her left, a large window is covered in a dense pattern of raindrops, with a blurred city street and glowing bokeh lights visible through the glass. The interior is filled with warm, nostalgic lighting, featuring vintage framed posters and a dark wood-paneled wall in the background. In the extreme foreground, an out-of-focus white ceramic cup of coffee sits on a wooden table. The image has a soft film grain, a shallow depth of field, and a quiet, moody, and serene atmosphere.

items.title: A stylish young man with medium length wavy dark hair and a c...
items.summary: A stylish young man with medium length wavy dark hair and a clean face, wearing a muted olive green button up shirt w...
items.content:
A stylish young man with medium-length wavy dark hair and a clean face, wearing a muted olive green button-up shirt with sleeves slightly rolled up, paired with loose fit black straight pants and white sneakers. The outfit looks minimal, modern, and aesthetic.
Create a fashion collage layout with 5 sections:
Center: a clean cutout of the outfit (olive shirt + black pants) placed vertically, slightly floating, with a soft white outline glow around it.
Around the center: four different lifestyle shots of the same man wearing the outfit.
Top left: indoor mirror selfie in a modern lobby with marble walls and shiny floor, holding phone covering face, relaxed walking pose.
Top right: outdoor greenery setting with plants and trees, walking pose with hands in pockets, looking sideways.
Bottom left: sitting pose on a bench or ledge, slightly leaning forward, one hand in hair, moody lighting.
Bottom right: urban street or stairs background with concrete textures, walking casually with hands in pockets.
Add minimal white curved arrows pointing from each lifestyle image toward the center outfit.
Lighting: soft natural light, slightly warm tone, cinematic shadows, Instagram aesthetic.
Color palette: neutral tones, olive green, black, white, soft greys.
Style: clean, minimal, high-end fashion lookbook, Pinterest / Instagram aesthetic.
Camera: 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, sharp subject focus.
Quality: ultra realistic, high resolution, 4K, detailed fabric texture.
items.contentChinese:
一位时尚年轻男子，及肩波浪深色中长发，面容干净，穿着低调的橄榄绿色纽扣衬衫（袖子微卷），搭配宽松直筒黑色长裤和白色运动鞋。整体造型简约、现代、有美感。
制作一个有5个区域的时尚拼贴布局：
中心：一张干净的服装抠图（橄榄色衬衫 + 黑色长裤）垂直放置，微微悬浮，周围有柔和的白色轮廓光晕。
围绕中心：四张同一名男子穿着该套装的不同生活方式照片。
左上：现代大堂室内镜面自拍，大理石墙面与光亮地面，手持手机遮挡面部，放松行走的姿势。
右上：户外绿色植被环境，有植物和树木，双手插兜行走，侧身望向一侧。
左下：坐在长椅或矮台上的坐姿，微微前倾，一只手拨头发，情绪感强的灯光。
右下：城市街道或楼梯背景，混凝土质感，随性行走并双手插兜。
从每张生活方式图片向中心服装指向的地方添加简约的白色弯曲箭头。
灯光：柔和自然光、略带暖色调、电影感阴影、Instagram 风格美学。
调色板：中性基调、橄榄绿、黑色、白色、柔和灰色。
风格：干净、极简、高端时尚型录，Pinterest / Instagram 美学。
相机：35mm 镜头、浅景深、主体清晰对焦。
画质：超逼真、高分辨率、4K、细致的面料纹理细节。

items.title: Ultra realistic 3D miniature diorama of a [BRAND NAME] enviro...
items.summary: Ultra realistic 3D miniature diorama of a [BRAND NAME] environment built inside a giant [ICONIC OBJECT OF BRAND], sho...
items.content:
Ultra-realistic 3D miniature diorama of a [BRAND NAME] environment built inside a giant [ICONIC OBJECT OF BRAND], shown in a clean cross-section or partially cut-open view revealing a detailed interior world.

Inside the structure, a fully detailed miniature [brand-specific environment: store / café / restaurant / showroom] exists, with realistic human activity such as staff working, customers interacting, and natural storytelling moments.

The [object] acts as both container and environment, with its materials and elements integrated into the architecture (e.g., layers, textures, surfaces forming terrain and structure).

Add dynamic storytelling elements: objects or particles suspended mid-air, subtle motion frozen in time (liquid splashes, falling elements, steam, crumbs, etc.).

Include volumetric atmosphere such as steam, fog, or light rays interacting with particles in the air to enhance cinematic depth.

Surfaces must be hyper-realistic with micro details: imperfections, condensation, reflections, dust, oil sheen, texture variations depending on the material.

Lighting should follow a cinematic high-end advertising style, with strong contrast between warm and cool tones, soft rim lighting outlining the subject, and natural light direction enhancing depth and realism.

Composition: slightly angled hero shot, clear cross-section visibility, centered subject, minimal but cinematic background with soft bokeh.

Shot on a macro lens, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh background, ultra-detailed textures, 8K resolution, filmic color grading, luxury commercial photography style.
items.contentChinese:
超写实的3D微型场景模型，展示了一个构建在巨型[品牌标志性物品]内部的[品牌名称]环境，以干净的剖面图或部分切开的视角呈现，揭示出一个精细的内部世界。

在结构内部，存在一个完全细节化的微型[品牌特定环境：商店 / 咖啡馆 / 餐厅 / 展厅]，有逼真的人类活动，例如员工工作、顾客互动，以及自然的叙事瞬间。

该[物体]既充当容器又作为环境，其材料和元素被整合进建筑中（例如，层次、纹理、表面形成地形和结构）。

加入动态叙事元素：悬浮在空中的物体或颗粒、被时间凝固的细微动作（液体飞溅、下落的碎片、蒸汽、面包屑等）。

包含体积感的大气效果，如蒸汽、雾或与空气中颗粒相互作用的光束，以增强电影般的纵深感。

表面必须超写实并具有微观细节：瑕疵、凝结、反射、灰尘、油光，以及因材料不同而产生的质地差异。

灯光应遵循电影级高端广告风格，暖冷色调之间有强烈对比，柔和的轮廓光勾勒主体，自然光方向增强深度与真实感。

构图：轻微倾斜的主视觉镜头，清晰的剖面可见性，居中主体，极简但具有电影感的背景及柔和的散景（bokeh）。

使用微距镜头拍摄，浅景深，奶油般的散景背景，超细节纹理，8K分辨率，电影化调色，高级商业摄影风格。

Create a clean, elegant luxury fashion moodboard with the editorial feeling: soft ivory background, large refined 'DAY 1' title at the top, one pinned seaside restaurant photo, one hero yellow satin halter-neck evening dress with an open back, and only a minimal number of supporting elements. Do not include extra accessories, extra bags, extra shoes, or extra jewelry. The composition must feel minimal, expensive, balanced, and professionally art directed, with strong hierarchy and generous negative space. The dress should be the main focal point, with a sleek modern silhouette, fluid satin drape, and premium fashion-house finish. The seaside restaurant photo should show an upscale evening dinner setup directly on the sand, with candlelight and romantic luxury atmosphere. The cocktail should be one elegant sea-inspired martini with ocean-blue or sea-glass tones. Add one short motivational quote near the bottom in a refined handwritten or script style. items.title: [NATURAL OBJECT] dissected as if by a master naturalist who f...
items.summary: [NATURAL OBJECT] dissected as if by a master naturalist who found it in the wild. Split and pinned open like a specim...
items.content:
[NATURAL OBJECT] dissected as if by a master naturalist who found it in the wild. Split and pinned open like a specimen, but lit as if Caravaggio worked for National Geographic.
Every internal structure glowing with its own material truth. Cross-section so sharp it feels violent. Interior so beautiful it feels sacred. The full object present, one half intact, one half opened to its core, every layer at the resolution of obsession.
Background: pure black velvet. The object floats in it like something precious and dangerous.
Labels pressed close, handwritten-weight serif, never floating: "[STRUCTURE]" / "[MATERIAL TRUTH]" / "[AGE OR SCALE]"
"[OBJECT] DISSECTED" title in warm ivory caps, upper left. "[One line that makes you lean closer]" italic beneath.
Mood: Audubon illustration meets Caravaggio meets the most beautiful science photograph ever taken. 4K, specimen lighting, extraordinary interior detail, nothing clinical, everything alive.
items.contentChinese:
[自然物] 被一位在野外发现它的大自然学家般解剖。像标本一样剖开并用别针固定，但灯光却像卡拉瓦乔为《国家地理》工作时那样照明。

每一处内部结构都以其自身的物质真实发光。剖面锋利得令人感到暴烈。内部之美令人觉得神圣。整体物体同在，一半完好无损，一半被打开至核心，每一层都以痴迷般的分辨率呈现。

背景：纯黑色天鹅绒。物体在其中悬浮，仿佛既珍贵又危险。

标签紧贴其上，带手写质感的衬线体，绝不飘浮：“[结构]” / “[物质真实]” / “[年龄或尺度]”

标题“[对象] 解剖”以暖象牙色大写字母呈现，位于左上。下面以斜体呈现一句让你靠近的台词：“[一句让你靠近的台词]”。

氛围：奥杜邦式插图遇上卡拉瓦乔，再遇上有史以来最美的科学摄影。4K，标本式照明，非凡的内部细节，无任何临床感，一切栩栩如生。

items.summary: A photorealistic, hyper detailed portrait of Miyawaki Sakura from the KPOP group LE SSERAFIM. She is a beautiful Japa...
items.content: A photorealistic, hyper-detailed portrait of Miyawaki Sakura from the KPOP group LE SSERAFIM. She is a beautiful Japanese young woman with elegant facial features, large expressive dark eyes, flawless fair skin, red lipstick, and long straight dark brown hair. She is wearing a deep emerald green lace corset bodysuit with structured satin cups and thin straps, paired with a matching emerald green silk fabric wrapped around her waist and tied in a large bow on her left hip, exposing her thigh. She is standing indoors in a dark, moody room. Her right arm is relaxed at her side, wearing a delicate silver bracelet. Her left hand is lifted, elegantly holding a smartphone. Warm cinematic lighting with a softly lit counter surface visible in the bottom right corner. 8k, highly detailed, ultra-realistic masterpiece. --ar 9:16
items.contentChinese: 一幅写实、超精细的宫脇咲良（KPOP组合 LE SSERAFIM 成员）的肖像。她是一位美丽的日本年轻女性，五官优雅，眼睛大而富有表情、深色，肌肤无瑕且白皙，涂着红色口红，留着又长又直的深棕色头发。她穿着一件深祖母绿色蕾丝紧身胸衣连体衣，具有有型的缎面胸杯和细肩带，搭配一块同色的祖母绿色丝绸布料缠绕在腰间，左侧髋部系成一个大蝴蝶结，露出大腿。她站在室内的一个阴暗、氛围感强的房间里。她的右臂自然垂在身侧，戴着一条精致的银手链。她的左手抬起，优雅地拿着一部智能手机。暖色的电影感灯光，画面右下角可见一个被柔和光线照亮的台面。8k，超高细节，超写实杰作。 --ar 9:16

items.title: [BRAND NAME]
items.summary: [BRAND NAME] Act as a High End CGI Product Photographer and 3D Render Artist specializing in streetwear merch and lim...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME]
Act as a High-End CGI Product Photographer and 3D Render Artist
specializing in streetwear merch and limited-edition collectibles.

PHASE 1: CONCEPT & OBJECT

Create a photorealistic CGI product shot of a premium keychain set
suspended in mid-air against a neutral gradient studio background.
The keychain set consists of THREE elements connected to a single
polished silver carabiner clip with a gold-plated split ring:

ELEMENT 1 — ACRYLIC TAG:

A rectangular acrylic charm (approx. 4:9 ratio, rounded corners, 3mm thick).
Layered construction: clear gloss acrylic front panel over a [BRAND NAME]-colored
background insert. The background insert carries bold, condensed all-caps
typography — autonomously generate a short poetic or brand-relevant phrase
(4–8 words) that matches [BRAND NAME]'s tone of voice, set in a heavy
condensed grotesque typeface (Bebas Neue / Impact / custom bold). Include
[BRAND NAME]'s URL or tagline in small print at the bottom of the insert.
Micro-printed fine text fills the lower third as a design texture element.

ELEMENT 2 — OVAL MEDALLION CHARM:

A die-cut oval hoop/ring shape (donut silhouette, 40mm diameter) made from
tinted translucent acrylic or resin. Autonomously determine the iconic
brand color of [BRAND NAME] and apply it as the tint (deep saturated,
jewel-tone translucency — e.g., gold, cobalt, emerald, crimson).
The [BRAND NAME] wordmark is engraved or UV-printed in bold all-caps
along the inner curve of the ring. Add 1–2 small iconographic symbols
(logo mark, globe icon, cloud glyph) laser-engraved onto the face.
Subtle radial sun-ray pattern embossed on the surface.

ELEMENT 3 — HARDWARE:

Silver anodized aluminum carabiner with knurled locking barrel.
Gold-plated brass split ring (key ring loop) at the top.
All metal surfaces show micro-scratches and machining marks —
no perfect CGI plastic. Industrial precision aesthetic.

PHASE 2: MATERIAL & TEXTURE

Render all acrylic elements with full Ray Tracing and Subsurface
Scattering — light must visibly pass through the tinted acrylic
creating internal glow. Apply Fresnel reflection on acrylic edges.
Surface imperfections: hairline scratches, micro-dust particles,
smudge traces on the clear panel (subtle, editorial-level — not dirty).
Metal: PBR metallic workflow — anisotropic specular highlights on
the carabiner barrel, brushed finish on the ring.
Typography on acrylic must appear screen-printed or UV spot-coated —
slight ink texture, not floating.

PHASE 3: COMPOSITION & STAGING

Levitation shot: the entire keychain set hangs suspended from the
top of frame, centered with a 10–15 degree rotation to the right
(showing dimensionality). Nothing touches a surface — pure float.
Camera angle: slightly below eye-level looking up at ~5 degrees,
portrait orientation (4:5 ratio).
Depth of Field: focus plane centered on the oval medallion,
acrylic tag in sharp secondary focus, top hardware with micro
bokeh blur. Aperture equivalent: f/4.0.
Negative space: generous — object occupies 55% of frame.

PHASE 4: LIGHTING

Primary: large octabox soft key light, positioned top-right at
45 degrees — creates clean specular bloom on acrylic edges.
Secondary: subtle rim light from bottom-left, cool temperature
(5500K), separates the object from background.
Background: seamless gradient cyclorama — dark steel blue (#1a2535)
at top transitioning to pale silver-grey (#d0d8e0) at bottom.
No hard shadows cast. Global Illumination active.
Chromatic Aberration: micro-level, visible only on acrylic edges
(adds realism, prevents CGI-plastic look).
No lens flare. No neon. No HDR overblown highlights.

TECH SPECS

Render engine: Octane Render or Blender Cycles (path-traced)
Resolution: 4096 x 5120px (4:5 portrait)
Samples: 4096 minimum
Color profile: Adobe RGB, D65 white point
Post-processing: subtle film grain overlay (ISO 400 equivalent),
+5 clarity, -10 highlights, neutral color grade
Output mood: High-end streetwear lookbook / limited drop product page
Style references: Kith accessories, Highsnobiety product editorial,
Fragment Design merch photography
NEGATIVE: No white studio infinity cove. No flat lay. No hand holding
the product. No fake bokeh blur filters. No AI plastic sheen.
No floating text outside the object.
items.contentChinese:
[BRAND NAME]
Act as a High-End CGI Product Photographer and 3D Render Artist
specializing in streetwear merch and limited-edition collectibles.

PHASE 1: 概念与对象

创建一张真实感 CGI 产品照，呈现一套高端钥匙扣，悬浮于中空，背景为中性渐变影棚。钥匙扣套件由三部分构成，均连接到单个抛光银色登山扣和一个镀金分裂圈：

ELEMENT 1 — 亚克力牌：

矩形亚克力吊饰（约 4:9 比例，圆角，厚度 3mm）。
分层结构：透明光面亚克力前板覆盖在 [BRAND NAME] 颜色的背景嵌片上。背景嵌片采用粗体、窄体全大写排版——自主生成一条与 [BRAND NAME] 语调匹配的简短诗意或品牌相关短语（4–8 词）。使用粗重压缩 grotesque 字体（Bebas Neue / Impact / 自定义加粗）。在嵌片底部以小字包含 [BRAND NAME] 的网址或标语。微印细文本填充下三分之一作为设计纹理元素。

ELEMENT 2 — 椭圆纪念牌吊饰：

模切椭圆环/环形（甜甜圈轮廓，直径 40mm），由着色半透明亚克力或树脂制成。自主决定 [BRAND NAME] 的标志性品牌色并将其用作色调（浓郁饱和、宝石色调的半透明，例如金色、钴蓝、祖母绿、深红）。在环的内侧曲线上以粗体全大写形式雕刻或 UV 印刷 [BRAND NAME] 字体标识。面上激光雕刻 1–2 个小型图标符号（徽标标识、地球图标、云形符号）。表面浮雕细微放射状光芒纹理。

ELEMENT 3 — 五金件：

银色阳极氧化铝登山扣，带滚花锁定筒。顶部为镀金黄铜分裂圈（钥匙圈环）。所有金属表面呈现微小划痕和加工痕迹——不要完美的 CGI 塑料感。工业精密美学。

PHASE 2: 材质与纹理

对所有亚克力元件使用完整光线追踪与次表面散射渲染——光线应明显透过着色亚克力，产生内部发光感。在亚克力边缘应用菲涅尔反射。表面瑕疵：发丝划痕、微尘颗粒、透明面板上的轻微指纹痕迹（细微、编辑级别——非脏污）。金属采用 PBR 金属流程——登山扣筒体呈各向异性高光，挂圈为拉丝处理。亚克力上的文字应呈现丝印或 UV 局部涂层效果——有轻微墨层质感，非悬浮感。

PHASE 3: 构图与布置

悬浮拍摄：整套钥匙扣自画面顶部悬挂，居中，向右旋转 10–15 度（呈现立体感）。无任何物体接触表面——纯悬浮。相机角度：略低于眼平线向上约 5 度，纵向构图（4:5 比例）。景深：对焦平面以椭圆纪念牌为中心，亚克力牌为清晰的次要对焦，顶部五金件呈微散景虚化。等效光圈：f/4.0。留白充裕——物体占画面约 55%。

PHASE 4: 灯光

主光：大号八角柔光箱主灯，置于右上方 45 度——在亚克力边缘形成干净的镜面高光溢散。辅光：来自左下角的微弱轮廓光，偏冷色温（5500K），将物体与背景分离。背景：无缝渐变弧形背景——顶部为深钢蓝 (#1a2535)，向下过渡到底部的淡银灰 (#d0d8e0)。不产生硬阴影。开启全局光照。色差：微量，仅在亚克力边缘可见（增加真实感，避免 CGI 塑料感）。禁止镜头光晕。无霓虹光。避免 HDR 过曝高光。

技术规格

渲染引擎：Octane Render 或 Blender Cycles（路径追踪）
分辨率：4096 x 5120px（4:5 纵向）
采样：最低 4096
色彩配置：Adobe RGB，D65 白点
后期处理：细微胶片颗粒覆盖（等同 ISO 400），清晰度 +5，高光 -10，中性色彩分级
输出调性：高端街头服饰型录 / 限量发售产品页面
风格参考：Kith 配饰，Highsnobiety 产品社论，Fragment Design 周边摄影
负面要求：不要白色无限背景弧舱。不要平铺拍摄。不要有人手持产品。不要使用假散景模糊滤镜。不要出现 AI 塑料光泽。物体外不要有浮动文字。

items.title: High fashion editorial photography of a woman with the upload...
items.summary: High fashion editorial photography of a woman with the uploaded face as reference, leaning casually against a geometr...
items.content: High-fashion editorial photography of a woman with the uploaded face as reference, leaning casually against a geometric orange wall with her right leg extended forward. She wears a tailored bright orange suit, matching tie, crisp white shirt, and chunky orange sneakers. Her styling is sleek and confident, with a modern, polished look. The environment is a surreal, minimalist room with seamless orange surfaces, featuring a vintage orange hatchback parked mid-ground left. Captured from a low-angle using a 24mm wide-angle lens for strong forced perspective, emphasizing the foreground sneaker with a deep depth of field. Soft, diffused studio lighting casts clean shadows, enhancing the vibrant, highly saturated monochromatic orange palette with sharp white accents, contrasting matte suit fabrics against smooth leather shoes and the glossy finish of the car.
items.contentChinese: 以上传的面部为参考的高端时尚编辑摄影，拍摄一位女性随意倚靠在几何形状的橙色墙面上，右腿向前伸出。她身穿剪裁利落的亮橙色西装、配套领带、洁白利落的衬衫和厚重的橙色运动鞋。造型干练自信，呈现出现代、精致的外观。场景为超现实的极简房间，表面无缝的橙色覆盖，画面中景左侧停放着一辆复古橙色两厢车。画面以低角度使用24mm广角镜头拍摄，产生强烈的透视夸张效果，配合大景深突出前景的运动鞋。柔和漫射的影棚灯光投射出干净的阴影，增强鲜艳高饱和的单色橙色调，并以锐利的白色点缀对比，凸显磨砂西装面料与光滑皮鞋及汽车光亮漆面之间的质感对比。
items.contentEnglish: High-fashion editorial photography of a woman with the uploaded face as reference, leaning casually against a geometric orange wall with her right leg extended forward. She wears a tailored bright orange suit, matching tie, crisp white shirt, and chunky orange sneakers. Her styling is sleek and confident, with a modern, polished look. The environment is a surreal, minimalist room with seamless orange surfaces, featuring a vintage orange hatchback parked mid-ground left. Captured from a low-angle using a 24mm wide-angle lens for strong forced perspective, emphasizing the foreground sneaker with a deep depth of field. Soft, diffused studio lighting casts clean shadows, enhancing the vibrant, highly saturated monochromatic orange palette with sharp white accents, contrasting matte suit fabrics against smooth leather shoes and the glossy finish of the car.

items.content: Create a creative photo of a person using the face from the uploaded image. The person is standing in a simple environment while surrounded by hand-drawn doodle elements. Around them are sketch-style drawings like arrows, lightning, stars, scribbles, and abstract shapes, as if drawn with a marker. Some doodles interact with the person, like wings on their back, a crown above their head, or energy lines around their body. The style is a mix of real photo and doodle art. The person is wearing casual modern clothes like a t-shirt, jacket, jeans, and sneakers. The background is clean so the doodles stand out. High contrast, creative composition, slightly messy sketch style, fun and expressive, ultra detailed, modern social media aesthetic.
items.contentChinese: 使用上传图像中的脸部创建一张创意照片。这个人站在简洁的环境中，周围被手绘涂鸦元素包围。身边有箭头、闪电、星星、潦草涂写和抽象形状等草图风格的图案，仿佛用记号笔绘制。有些涂鸦与人物互动，例如背上的翅膀、头顶上的王冠，或环绕身体的能量线条。风格是现实照片与涂鸦艺术的混合。此人穿着休闲现代的服装，如T恤、夹克、牛仔裤和运动鞋。背景干净以便涂鸦突出。高对比、创意构图、略显凌乱的速写风格、有趣且富有表现力、超高细节、现代社交媒体美学。

items.content: Transform this movie poster into a child’s crayon drawing on lined notebook paper. Every compositional element, character pose, typography, color palette, and layout is preserved exactly as the original — only the art style has changed. Drawn in colored pencil and crayon with wobbly unsteady lines, uneven coloring that goes slightly outside the lines, basic facial features, simplified anatomy. items.title: A stunning Trompe L’oeil 3D composition, where the subject—us...
items.summary: A stunning Trompe L’oeil 3D composition, where the subject—using an uploaded face as reference—appears to physically...
items.content: A stunning Trompe L’oeil 3D composition, where the subject—using an uploaded face as reference—appears to physically tear through a clean white drawing paper and emerge from a graphite sketch into the real world. The subject’s upper body is fully rendered in hyper-realistic color and texture, wearing the same clothes from the uploaded image, while the lower body remains a 2D pencil sketch on paper. Shot from an aerial (top-down) perspective using a 24mm lens to capture the entire drawing desk environment, including oversized pencils and erasers scattered around. The lighting is a blend of flat studio light for the paper area and dramatic side lighting with volumetric effects for the emerging 3D figure, casting realistic shadows that fall back onto the sketch area. 8K resolution, ray tracing, and advanced shading techniques are used to blur the boundary between illustration and reality in this extraordinary surrealist piece.
items.contentChinese: 一幅惊艳的 Trompe L’oeil 3D 构图，主体——以上传的面部作为参考——仿佛从一张干净的白色绘图纸上物理撕裂出来，从石墨素描中浮现到现实世界。主体的上半身以超写实的色彩和质感完整呈现，穿着与上传图像相同的服装，而下半身仍保持在纸上的二维铅笔素描。以航拍（俯视）视角使用24mm镜头拍摄，以捕捉整个绘图桌环境，包括散落的大号铅笔和橡皮擦。光线在纸面区域采用平坦的工作室光，而对浮现的三维人物则采用带体积感的戏剧性侧光，两者混合，投射出逼真的阴影，回落在素描区域上。使用8K分辨率、光线追踪和高级着色技术，在这件非凡的超现实主义作品中模糊插画与现实之间的界限。
items.contentEnglish: A stunning Trompe L’oeil 3D composition, where the subject—using an uploaded face as reference—appears to physically tear through a clean white drawing paper and emerge from a graphite sketch into the real world. The subject’s upper body is fully rendered in hyper-realistic color and texture, wearing the same clothes from the uploaded image, while the lower body remains a 2D pencil sketch on paper. Shot from an aerial (top-down) perspective using a 24mm lens to capture the entire drawing desk environment, including oversized pencils and erasers scattered around. The lighting is a blend of flat studio light for the paper area and dramatic side lighting with volumetric effects for the emerging 3D figure, casting realistic shadows that fall back onto the sketch area. 8K resolution, ray tracing, and advanced shading techniques are used to blur the boundary between illustration and reality in this extraordinary surrealist piece.

items.title: [BRAND NAME]. Act as a Senior 3D Product Visualization Artist...
items.summary: [BRAND NAME]. Act as a Senior 3D Product Visualization Artist and Cinematic Art Director specializing in luxury brand...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME]. Act as a Senior 3D Product Visualization Artist and Cinematic Art Director specializing in luxury brand key visuals for high-end editorial and streetwear campaigns.

PHASE 1: LOGO SUBJECT

Autonomously identify the official, universally recognized logo/logotype of [BRAND NAME]. Reproduce it with maximum fidelity to the original silhouette, proportions, andgeometry — no stylistic distortion, no graffiti interpretation. The logo shape must be instantlyrecognizable as the real [BRAND NAME] mark. Extrude the logo into a solid 3D object with a depth of approximately 15–20% of its height. All surfaces — front face, side extrusion, and beveled edges — must be coated in a single unified material: Surface material: hyper-polished liquid chrome. Reflectance value 0.98 — near-perfect mirror finish. Apply full Ray-Traced environment reflections: the logo must visibly reflect the surrounding sky gradient, flower field, and light sources within its curved and flat surfaces. Bevel radius on all hard edges: moderate
(enough to catch sharp specular highlights). Add Subsurface Scattering on the thinnest structural parts of the logo (fine lines, serifs, icon details) to create a subtle inner glow at the edges.
Place 4–8 prismatic star-shaped lens-flare sparkles (4-point) at the highest specular peaks — corners, tips, and curved peaks of the logo geometry. The sparkles must feel organic, not uniformly distributed. Zero matte surfaces. Zero plastic look. The entire object must read as cast from liquid silver.

PHASE 2: ENVIRONMENT & BACKGROUND

Background: a wide cinematic landscape at the golden-lilac hour (just after sunset). A vast flower field fills the lower third — densely packed lavender and white wildflowers with realistic micro-texture and subtle wind motion-blur on the far clusters. Middle ground fades into soft purple-grey bokeh haze. Sky: gradient from warm blush rose (#E8A0BF) at the horizon through lilac (#C3A6D4) to cool powder blue (#A8C4D8) at the top. Add 3–5 loose silhouetted bird clusters (starlings, small and sharp) scattered across the upper left and right quadrants. Volumetric atmospheric haze
sits on the horizon line. Autonomously shift the environment's color palette to reflect [BRAND NAME]'s iconic brand identity — introduce the brand's signature hue as a tonal wash in the sky gradient or as the dominant flower color in the field. Preserve the overall ethereal, editorial mood. The environment must feel like it was art-directed specifically for this brand — not generic.

PHASE 3: COMPOSITION & LAYOUT

Format: 1:1 square. The chrome logo is centered horizontally and placed at the vertical midpoint — monumental in scale, spanning 65–80% of frame width.Apply a subtle forced perspective tilt (2–4 degrees)
for dynamic energy without distorting logo recognition. The bottom edge of the logo object grazes or slightly overlaps the top of the flower field, integrating the 3D object naturally into the environment. The logo casts a soft diffused shadow downward into the flowers. Lower-left corner: 2–3 lines of micro-copy in clean white sans-serif at minimal optical size. Autonomously generate a poetic 3-line brand statement relevant to [BRAND NAME]'s world, heritage, and aesthetic language. Bottom-left: "[BRAND NAME]" in small caps logotype label. Bottom-right: a secondary flat 2D chrome version of the same logo rendered small as a finishing mark.

PHASE 4: LIGHTING

Primary: large soft area light from upper-left simulating post-sunset overcast sky — fully diffused, no hard shadows, color temperature 5800K with a lilac tint overlay. Secondary: warm rim light (3200K) grazing the bottom and side edges of the logo from behind — creates a golden separation halo between the object and the field. Global Illumination enabled — the chrome logo must realistically bounce and absorb the landscape's ambient color. The flower field's purple tones should be faintly visible in the lower reflective surfaces of the logo. Volumetric god rays faintly visible through any negative space or cutouts within the logo geometry.

TECH SPECS

Render engine: Octane Render aesthetic. Ray Tracing: maximum bounces (16+). Depth of Field: f/11 equivalent — full logo sharp, far background in soft bokeh only. Tone mapping: lifted blacks, compressed highlights, filmic S-curve. Color grade: desaturated midtones, preserved pastels, cool shadow tones. Film grain: subtle (ISO 200 equivalent). Chromatic Aberration: 0.2–0.3px on peripheral logo
edges only. Anti-aliasing: maximum. Strictly no AI-plastic normals. No smooth uniform shading. Microscopic surface imperfections on the chrome required for realism (micro-scratches, 0.5%
roughness noise map). Mood reference: luxury brand retrospective editorial for Highsnobiety or AnOther Magazine.
items.contentChinese:
[品牌名称]。担任高级3D产品视觉化艺术家及电影艺术总监，专注于奢侈品牌的高端编辑及街头服饰宣传关键视觉创作。

阶段1：标志主体

自主识别[品牌名称]官方且全球公认的标志/标识。最大限度忠实还原其原始轮廓、比例与几何结构——绝不进行风格化变形或涂鸦式诠释。标志形状必须即时辨认为真实的[品牌名称]标记。将标志挤出成为实体三维物体，厚度约为标志高度的15–20%。所有表面——正面、侧面挤压及倒角边缘——统一采用单一材质：超抛光液态铬，反射率值0.98，近乎完美镜面效果。全光线追踪环境反射：标志必须可见地反射周围天空渐变、花田及光源于其曲面和平面上。所有锐利边缘倒角半径为中等（足以捕捉锐利高光）。在标志最细微结构部分（细线、衬线、图标细节）添加次表面散射，形成边缘细腻内发光。于标志几何的高光峰值（角落、尖端及弧形峰）配置4至8颗棱镜状星形镜头光斑（四角星）。光斑分布自然不均匀。零哑光面，零塑料感，整体质感仿若液态铸银。

阶段2：环境与背景

背景：黄金紫丁香时刻（落日后不久），宽幅电影感景观。下三分之一为辽阔花海——密集的薰衣草与白色野花，细腻的微观纹理与远景花簇的微风动态模糊。中景渐变为柔和紫灰色散景朦胧。天空采用渐变色，从地平线处暖玫瑰红（#E8A0BF）通过紫丁香色（#C3A6D4）至顶部冷粉蓝（#A8C4D8）。左上及右上象限散布3–5组松散群鸟剪影（椋鸟，小巧锐利）。地平线带有体积大气雾霭。自主调整环境色彩以反映[品牌名称]标志性品牌色彩——或在天空渐变中添加品牌专属色调洗印，或使花田主色呈现品牌标志色。整体氛围需保持飘渺且具编辑感，体现专为该品牌艺术指导而非通用背景。

阶段3：构图与布局

画面格式为1:1正方形。液态铬标志水平居中，垂直居中位置，体量宏大，占据画面宽度65–80%。轻微强制透视倾斜（2–4度）营造动感且不影响标志识别。标志底部边缘接触或略微重叠花田顶部，使三维物体自然融入环境。标志投射柔和扩散阴影于花丛下方。左下角置白色无衬线极细字体微文案2–3行，自主生成与[品牌名称]世界观、传承及美学语言相关的诗意三行品牌声明。左下角标注小写大写混排的[品牌名称]标识标签。右下角渲染同款标志的小尺寸平面二次元铬质版作为收尾标识。

阶段4：照明

主光源：自左上方来的大面积柔光，模拟落日后阴天天空，无硬影，色温5800K并叠加紫丁香色调。辅光源：3200K温暖边缘光，从标志底部及侧边背后扫射，形成物体与花田之间的金色分离晕。开启全局光照——液态铬标志须真实反射并吸收景观环境色彩。花田紫色色调应微微映现于标志底部反射面。标志几何的空隙或切口中隐约可见体积神光。

技术规格

渲染引擎：Octane Render美学。光线追踪：最大反弹次数（16+）。景深：等效f/11——标志全锐利，远景柔焦散景。色调映射：提亮黑色区域，压缩高光，电影感S曲线。色彩调校：中间调去饱和，保持柔和粉彩，阴影冷色调。胶片颗粒：微妙（ISO 200等效）。色差：仅标志边缘外围0.2–0.3像素。抗锯齿：最高。严禁使用AI塑料质感法线。禁止平滑均匀着色。铬质表面需具备微观细节（微划痕，0.5%粗糙度噪点贴图）以增加真实感。整体氛围参考：为Highsnobiety或AnOther Magazine制作的奢侈品牌复古编辑视觉。
items.contentEnglish:
[BRAND NAME]. Act as a Senior 3D Product Visualization Artist and Cinematic Art Director specializing in luxury brand key visuals for high-end editorial and streetwear campaigns.

PHASE 1: LOGO SUBJECT

Autonomously identify the official, universally recognized logo/logotype of [BRAND NAME]. Reproduce it with maximum fidelity to the original silhouette, proportions, andgeometry — no stylistic distortion, no graffiti interpretation. The logo shape must be instantlyrecognizable as the real [BRAND NAME] mark. Extrude the logo into a solid 3D object with a depth of approximately 15–20% of its height. All surfaces — front face, side extrusion, and beveled edges — must be coated in a single unified material: Surface material: hyper-polished liquid chrome. Reflectance value 0.98 — near-perfect mirror finish. Apply full Ray-Traced environment reflections: the logo must visibly reflect the surrounding sky gradient, flower field, and light sources within its curved and flat surfaces. Bevel radius on all hard edges: moderate
(enough to catch sharp specular highlights). Add Subsurface Scattering on the thinnest structural parts of the logo (fine lines, serifs, icon details) to create a subtle inner glow at the edges.
Place 4–8 prismatic star-shaped lens-flare sparkles (4-point) at the highest specular peaks — corners, tips, and curved peaks of the logo geometry. The sparkles must feel organic, not uniformly distributed. Zero matte surfaces. Zero plastic look. The entire object must read as cast from liquid silver.

PHASE 2: ENVIRONMENT & BACKGROUND

Background: a wide cinematic landscape at the golden-lilac hour (just after sunset). A vast flower field fills the lower third — densely packed lavender and white wildflowers with realistic micro-texture and subtle wind motion-blur on the far clusters. Middle ground fades into soft purple-grey bokeh haze. Sky: gradient from warm blush rose (#E8A0BF) at the horizon through lilac (#C3A6D4) to cool powder blue (#A8C4D8) at the top. Add 3–5 loose silhouetted bird clusters (starlings, small and sharp) scattered across the upper left and right quadrants. Volumetric atmospheric haze
sits on the horizon line. Autonomously shift the environment's color palette to reflect [BRAND NAME]'s iconic brand identity — introduce the brand's signature hue as a tonal wash in the sky gradient or as the dominant flower color in the field. Preserve the overall ethereal, editorial mood. The environment must feel like it was art-directed specifically for this brand — not generic.

PHASE 3: COMPOSITION & LAYOUT

Format: 1:1 square. The chrome logo is centered horizontally and placed at the vertical midpoint — monumental in scale, spanning 65–80% of frame width.Apply a subtle forced perspective tilt (2–4 degrees)
for dynamic energy without distorting logo recognition. The bottom edge of the logo object grazes or slightly overlaps the top of the flower field, integrating the 3D object naturally into the environment. The logo casts a soft diffused shadow downward into the flowers. Lower-left corner: 2–3 lines of micro-copy in clean white sans-serif at minimal optical size. Autonomously generate a poetic 3-line brand statement relevant to [BRAND NAME]'s world, heritage, and aesthetic language. Bottom-left: "[BRAND NAME]" in small caps logotype label. Bottom-right: a secondary flat 2D chrome version of the same logo rendered small as a finishing mark.

PHASE 4: LIGHTING

Primary: large soft area light from upper-left simulating post-sunset overcast sky — fully diffused, no hard shadows, color temperature 5800K with a lilac tint overlay. Secondary: warm rim light (3200K) grazing the bottom and side edges of the logo from behind — creates a golden separation halo between the object and the field. Global Illumination enabled — the chrome logo must realistically bounce and absorb the landscape's ambient color. The flower field's purple tones should be faintly visible in the lower reflective surfaces of the logo. Volumetric god rays faintly visible through any negative space or cutouts within the logo geometry.

TECH SPECS

Render engine: Octane Render aesthetic. Ray Tracing: maximum bounces (16+). Depth of Field: f/11 equivalent — full logo sharp, far background in soft bokeh only. Tone mapping: lifted blacks, compressed highlights, filmic S-curve. Color grade: desaturated midtones, preserved pastels, cool shadow tones. Film grain: subtle (ISO 200 equivalent). Chromatic Aberration: 0.2–0.3px on peripheral logo
edges only. Anti-aliasing: maximum. Strictly no AI-plastic normals. No smooth uniform shading. Microscopic surface imperfections on the chrome required for realism (micro-scratches, 0.5%
roughness noise map). Mood reference: luxury brand retrospective editorial for Highsnobiety or AnOther Magazine.

items.content: A hyper-realistic 3D photo concept showing a hand holding a square polaroid photo labeled “ELEMENT”. Inside the photo, there’s a close-up of [ELEMENT], and it flows seamlessly out of the photo frame into the real world, naturally interacting with the surface below. The text “ELEMENT” appears printed cleanly on the white border of the photo. Realistic cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, artistic composition, 1080x1080 square format.

items.summary: 东方古风清雅女性正面肖像，超近景贴脸特写，人物正面面对镜头，头部端正，视线直视镜头，脸部几乎充满画面，构图集中，双眼位于视觉中心，整体呈现强烈的人脸主导感。 人物气质清雅、端庄、疏离、含蓄，像高门贵女、仙门弟子、带距离感的古典仕女，安...
items.content:
东方古风清雅女性正面肖像，超近景贴脸特写，人物正面面对镜头，头部端正，视线直视镜头，脸部几乎充满画面，构图集中，双眼位于视觉中心，整体呈现强烈的人脸主导感。
人物气质清雅、端庄、疏离、含蓄，像高门贵女、仙门弟子、带距离感的古典仕女，安静中带一种不容轻犯的从容。整体观感干净、精致、高级，不做甜美活泼感，不做冷艳危险感，不做现代时尚感。
脸型为窄长鹅蛋脸，脸宽较窄，纵向比例偏长，面中舒展，整体轮廓收紧修长，面部留白适中。额头中等偏高，发际线整齐、轮廓饱满流畅。太阳穴平顺微内收但不凹陷，颧弓不外扩，苹果肌轻微平整，不做甜感饱满苹果肌，面中过渡平整流畅，鼻基底适中，法令区干净。下颌线柔和但走向清晰，下颌角弱化，下巴中等长度偏尖，收口利落精致，骨相轻薄修长，上镜感强。
五官精致古典。眉毛为深棕色自然弯眉，眉形柔弧流畅，眉峰轻微自然，眉尾细而下收，眉眼距离适中偏宽，整体呈现古典温柔感。眼睛为细长杏眼偏凤眼感，双眼对称，眼裂偏长，纵向开合中等偏窄，内眼角略尖清晰，外眼角向外轻微上挑，上眼皮薄而干净，双眼皮窄自然，下眼睑存在感清晰，卧蚕轻微精致不膨胀。眼神直视镜头，目光安静、清澈、疏离、端庄，带轻微不可接近感，不做甜妹无辜感，不做冷艳攻击感。睫毛纤长自然，上睫毛柔和拉长，下睫毛纤细分明，不做夸张浓密效果。鼻子为高挺秀气鼻，山根中等偏高自然顺接额头，鼻梁细直干净，鼻背平整挺拔，鼻头小巧精致微圆，鼻尖轻收，鼻翼窄，鼻孔不外露，中轴稳定，东方精致感，不做夸张欧美高挺鼻。嘴唇为中等厚度唇，唇峰清晰柔和，上唇中等，下唇微饱满，唇形端庄古典，嘴角自然平直，不做甜美嘟唇，不做大笑表情。
皮肤为冷白瓷感肤色，白皙通透匀净，底妆为高完成度瓷感底妆，肤质统一干净，细腻柔滑如上釉瓷器，带高级精修感。面中、鼻梁、鼻尖、眼下有轻微提亮，高光克制细腻，不做韩系油亮水光肌。面部轮廓修容精细但克制，鼻侧影自然，颧侧轻微收紧，下颌修容干净，立体度来自柔和明暗关系而不是夸张硬阴影。
妆容为古风仕女感精致妆容，明确带妆，妆感温暖古典。眼妆以暖橘棕、柔和赤茶、浅珊瑚为主色调，上眼影从睫毛根部向上柔和晕染，色彩干净通透，内眼线轻微填满，外眼线纤细柔和向外轻微拉长，眼尾上扬幅度极克制，下眼睑后半段极轻微暖橘晕染，下睫毛纤细分明，卧蚕以窄面积柔和提亮呈现，不做甜妹膨胀卧蚕。眉妆自然克制，色调与发色协调。腮红为柔和暖杏橘色，位置偏面中偏高，存在感低，自然融入肤色。唇妆为中饱和暖红棕、柔和赤茶调，中心略深边缘柔化，唇面保留轻微质感，整体妆容温暖古典、清雅内敛。
发型为黑色盘发古风发髻，发缝自然偏分，发质顺滑，发量适中偏多，头顶盘成精致高髻，两侧有少量碎发自然垂落修饰脸型，额前轻微碎发但不遮挡眉眼主体。发顶轮廓干净圆润。可搭配低调古风发饰，如蓝宝石花簪、金丝蝶饰、小型珠坠流苏，风格雅致精致，不夸张不繁重，与衣饰色调统一。
服饰为浅蓝色至雾蓝色古风广袖衣裳，面料轻透柔软，带轻纱层叠感，肩颈区域布料自然垂落，领口结构精致干净。面料上可见精致金色凤鸟纹刺绣，纹饰繁复但不凌乱，金线细腻闪烁，局部点缀蓝宝石色小型珠饰。整体造型统一于仙门贵女、古典仕女方向。
光线为柔和均匀正面布光，主光正面略偏上打在额头、眼周、鼻梁、唇部，让脸部中央清晰，五官干净立体。光线均匀柔和，不做强烈明暗对比。整体色调偏冷中性偏蓝灰，背景为柔和雾蓝灰色虚化，与服饰色调形成统一色境。人物肤色保持自然冷白，唇部保留暖红棕形成轻微冷暖对比。画面具有影视级真实摄影质感，细节干净，高级精修，非卡通，非插画，非二次元，偏真实摄影与古风写真效果。
画面仅聚焦于面部、五官、皮肤、妆容、发型与服饰本身，不加入场景信息，不加入动作叙事，不加入手部，不加入背景道具，不加入文字信息。极近景贴脸特写，面部填满画面，正面直视。不做侧脸，不做低头俯视，不做仰拍。非卡通，非插画，非二次元，非3D渲染。
在画面右下角加入专属签名"voxcat"，签名形式为小型自然手写英文签名，笔触干净利落，尺寸较小，不抢主体，不破坏整体构图，与画面古风清雅气质统一；签名颜色可为低饱和白色、灰白色或淡金色，具有高级感与作品标识感。
items.contentChinese:
东方古风清雅女性正面肖像，超近景贴脸特写，人物正面面对镜头，头部端正，视线直视镜头，脸部几乎充满画面，构图集中，双眼位于视觉中心，整体呈现强烈的人脸主导感。
人物气质清雅、端庄、疏离、含蓄，像高门贵女、仙门弟子、带距离感的古典仕女，安静中带一种不容轻犯的从容。整体观感干净、精致、高级，不做甜美活泼感，不做冷艳危险感，不做现代时尚感。
脸型为窄长鹅蛋脸，脸宽较窄，纵向比例偏长，面中舒展，整体轮廓收紧修长，面部留白适中。额头中等偏高，发际线整齐、轮廓饱满流畅。太阳穴平顺微内收但不凹陷，颧弓不外扩，苹果肌轻微平整，不做甜感饱满苹果肌，面中过渡平整流畅，鼻基底适中，法令区干净。下颌线柔和但走向清晰，下颌角弱化，下巴中等长度偏尖，收口利落精致，骨相轻薄修长，上镜感强。
五官精致古典。眉毛为深棕色自然弯眉，眉形柔弧流畅，眉峰轻微自然，眉尾细而下收，眉眼距离适中偏宽，整体呈现古典温柔感。眼睛为细长杏眼偏凤眼感，双眼对称，眼裂偏长，纵向开合中等偏窄，内眼角略尖清晰，外眼角向外轻微上挑，上眼皮薄而干净，双眼皮窄自然，下眼睑存在感清晰，卧蚕轻微精致不膨胀。眼神直视镜头，目光安静、清澈、疏离、端庄，带轻微不可接近感，不做甜妹无辜感，不做冷艳攻击感。睫毛纤长自然，上睫毛柔和拉长，下睫毛纤细分明，不做夸张浓密效果。鼻子为高挺秀气鼻，山根中等偏高自然顺接额头，鼻梁细直干净，鼻背平整挺拔，鼻头小巧精致微圆，鼻尖轻收，鼻翼窄，鼻孔不外露，中轴稳定，东方精致感，不做夸张欧美高挺鼻。嘴唇为中等厚度唇，唇峰清晰柔和，上唇中等，下唇微饱满，唇形端庄古典，嘴角自然平直，不做甜美嘟唇，不做大笑表情。
皮肤为冷白瓷感肤色，白皙通透匀净，底妆为高完成度瓷感底妆，肤质统一干净，细腻柔滑如上釉瓷器，带高级精修感。面中、鼻梁、鼻尖、眼下有轻微提亮，高光克制细腻，不做韩系油亮水光肌。面部轮廓修容精细但克制，鼻侧影自然，颧侧轻微收紧，下颌修容干净，立体度来自柔和明暗关系而不是夸张硬阴影。
妆容为古风仕女感精致妆容，明确带妆，妆感温暖古典。眼妆以暖橘棕、柔和赤茶、浅珊瑚为主色调，上眼影从睫毛根部向上柔和晕染，色彩干净通透，内眼线轻微填满，外眼线纤细柔和向外轻微拉长，眼尾上扬幅度极克制，下眼睑后半段极轻微暖橘晕染，下睫毛纤细分明，卧蚕以窄面积柔和提亮呈现，不做甜妹膨胀卧蚕。眉妆自然克制，色调与发色协调。腮红为柔和暖杏橘色，位置偏面中偏高，存在感低，自然融入肤色。唇妆为中饱和暖红棕、柔和赤茶调，中心略深边缘柔化，唇面保留轻微质感，整体妆容温暖古典、清雅内敛。
发型为黑色盘发古风发髻，发缝自然偏分，发质顺滑，发量适中偏多，头顶盘成精致高髻，两侧有少量碎发自然垂落修饰脸型，额前轻微碎发但不遮挡眉眼主体。发顶轮廓干净圆润。可搭配低调古风发饰，如蓝宝石花簪、金丝蝶饰、小型珠坠流苏，风格雅致精致，不夸张不繁重，与衣饰色调统一。
服饰为浅蓝色至雾蓝色古风广袖衣裳，面料轻透柔软，带轻纱层叠感，肩颈区域布料自然垂落，领口结构精致干净。面料上可见精致金色凤鸟纹刺绣，纹饰繁复但不凌乱，金线细腻闪烁，局部点缀蓝宝石色小型珠饰。整体造型统一于仙门贵女、古典仕女方向。
光线为柔和均匀正面布光，主光正面略偏上打在额头、眼周、鼻梁、唇部，让脸部中央清晰，五官干净立体。光线均匀柔和，不做强烈明暗对比。整体色调偏冷中性偏蓝灰，背景为柔和雾蓝灰色虚化，与服饰色调形成统一色境。人物肤色保持自然冷白，唇部保留暖红棕形成轻微冷暖对比。画面具有影视级真实摄影质感，细节干净，高级精修，非卡通，非插画，非二次元，偏真实摄影与古风写真效果。
画面仅聚焦于面部、五官、皮肤、妆容、发型与服饰本身，不加入场景信息，不加入动作叙事，不加入手部，不加入背景道具，不加入文字信息。极近景贴脸特写，面部填满画面，正面直视。不做侧脸，不做低头俯视，不做仰拍。非卡通，非插画，非二次元，非3D渲染。
在画面右下角加入专属签名"voxcat"，签名形式为小型自然手写英文签名，笔触干净利落，尺寸较小，不抢主体，不破坏整体构图，与画面古风清雅气质统一；签名颜色可为低饱和白色、灰白色或淡金色，具有高级感与作品标识感。
items.contentEnglish:
Eastern, classical-style elegant female frontal portrait, extreme close-up face shot with the face filling the frame. The subject faces the camera directly, head held straight, gaze looking straight at the lens. The face almost fills the image, composition is concentrated, both eyes located at the visual center, presenting a strong face-dominant presence.

The subject’s temperament is elegant, dignified, aloof, and reserved—like a noble young lady from a distinguished family, a disciple of a celestial sect, or a classical lady with a sense of distance. Quiet yet carrying an unassailable composure. The overall impression is clean, refined, and high-end; not sweet or lively, not coldly glamorous or threatening, and not modern-fashion forward.

Face shape: a narrow, long egg-shaped face. The face width is relatively narrow with an elongated vertical proportion; the central face is relaxed, the overall contour tightened and slender, with moderate negative space on the face. Forehead medium to slightly high, hairline neat with full, smooth contours. Temples smooth and slightly indrawn but not hollow; zygomatic arches not flared; apple cheeks mildly flat, not full in a sweet way. Midface transitions are smooth and even. Nose base moderate, nasolabial area clean. Jawline soft but clearly defined, mandibular angle softened, chin of medium length slightly pointed, neat and refined closure, bone structure thin and elongated, photogenic.

Facial features are delicate and classical. Eyebrows: deep brown, naturally curved brows, soft smooth arc, slight natural peak, tail thin and tapering downward, moderate-to-wide brow-eye distance, giving a classical gentle feel. Eyes: narrow, elongated almond eyes with a slight phoenix-eye quality; symmetrical, relatively long palpebral fissures, vertical opening medium-narrow. Inner canthi slightly pointed and defined; outer canthi slightly lifted outward. Upper eyelids thin and clean; double eyelids narrow and natural. Lower eyelid has a clear presence; aegyo-sal (lower-eye highlight) is slight, delicate and non-puffy. The gaze looks straight into the camera—calm, clear, aloof, and dignified, with a slight unapproachable air. Do not create a sweet innocent look or a cold, aggressive glamour. Eyelashes long and natural—upper lashes gently lengthening, lower lashes fine and distinct; avoid exaggerated thickness. Nose: high and refined but delicate—nasion moderately high and smoothly connected to the forehead, bridge straight and clean, dorsum flat and prominent, tip small, refined and slightly rounded with a gentle tuck, narrow alae, nostrils not flared, stable midline, Eastern delicate impression; do not create an exaggerated Western-style high nose. Lips: medium thickness, clear and soft cupid’s bow, upper lip medium, lower lip slightly fuller; lip shape dignified and classical, corners naturally straight—no pouty sweetness, no big laughing expression.

Skin: cool porcelain complexion, fair, translucent, even. Foundation: high-completion porcelain finish, unified and clean skin texture, fine and smooth like glazed porcelain with a high-end retouch feel. Subtle highlights on the midface, bridge, tip of the nose, and under the eyes; highlights restrained and delicate—avoid a glossy K-beauty dewy look. Contouring is refined but restrained: natural nasal side shadows, slight tightening at the cheek sides, clean jaw contouring; three-dimensionality comes from soft light-and-shadow relationships rather than exaggerated hard shadows.

Makeup: refined classical-lady style, clearly made-up, warm-classical makeup feel. Eye makeup uses warm orange-browns, soft reddish-browns, and light coral as the main tones. Eyeshadow is softly blended upward from the lash line, colors clean and translucent. Tightline slightly filled; outer liner thin, soft, and slightly extended outward, with extremely restrained lift at the outer corner. Very subtle warm orange shading on the posterior lower lash line. Lower lashes fine and distinct. Aegyo-sal presented as a narrow, softly brightened area—not a sweet, puffy aegyo-sal. Brows made up naturally and restrained, color coordinated with hair. Blush is a soft warm apricot-orange, placed slightly toward the midface and higher, low in presence and naturally blended into the skin. Lip color is a medium-saturated warm red-brown / soft reddish-brown tone, slightly deeper in the center with softened edges; lips retain a slight texture. Overall makeup is warm-classical, elegant and restrained.

Hairstyle: black updo in a classical chignon. Natural slight side parting at the hairline, smooth hair texture, moderate to slightly abundant volume. Hair on top arranged into an exquisite high bun; small amounts of loose strands on both sides naturally fall to frame the face, with slight forehead wisps that do not obscure brows or eyes. Top hairline shape is clean and rounded. Can be paired with low-key classical hair ornaments such as a sapphire floral pin, gold-wire butterfly ornament, or small pearl tassel pendants—elegant and delicate, not exaggerated or heavy, color-coordinated with the clothing.

Clothing: wide-sleeved ancient-style garment in pale blue to mist-blue. Fabric light, soft, with layered sheer quality; material around shoulders and neck drapes naturally, collar structure delicate and clean. Fabric may feature fine gold phoenix-and-bird embroidery—intricate but not cluttered—gold threads delicate and subtly shimmering, with small sapphire-colored bead accents in places. Overall styling unified toward the celestial-sect noble lady / classical lady direction.

Lighting: soft, even frontal lighting, main light slightly above center striking the forehead, eye area, bridge of the nose, and lips so the central face reads clearly and features are clean and three-dimensional. Lighting even and gentle without strong contrast. Overall color tone is cool-neutral leaning blue-gray; background is softly blurred mist-blue-gray, forming a unified color atmosphere with the garment. Skin tone remains a natural cool white while lips keep warm red-brown for a slight cool-warm contrast. The image should have a cinematic-level realistic photographic quality, clean details, high-end retouching; not cartoon, not illustration, not anime—leaning toward realistic photography and classical portraiture.

The image should focus only on the face, facial features, skin, makeup, hair, and the clothing itself. Do not include scene information, narrative actions, hands, background props, or textual elements. Extreme close-up face shot with the face filling the frame, frontal gaze. Do not do profile, looking down, or low-angle upshot. Not cartoon, not illustration, not anime, not 3D rendering.

Add an exclusive signature "voxcat" in the lower right corner of the image. The signature should be a small, natural handwritten English signature with clean, crisp strokes, small in size so it does not compete with the subject or disrupt the composition, and matching the classical elegant temperament. The signature color may be low-saturation white, off-white gray, or pale gold, conveying a high-end, identifiable mark.

items.title: A warm, cozy, and high quality portrait of a young woman with...
items.summary: A warm, cozy, and high quality portrait of a young woman with long, wavy blonde brown hair, captured in a soft side p...
items.content: A warm, cozy, and high-quality portrait of a young woman with long, wavy blonde-brown hair, captured in a soft side profile. She is smiling gently and looking downward, her left hand delicately adjusting the brim of a classic brown wool baker boy cap. The cap features a thick, felted texture with a small button nub on top. She is wearing an oversized, chunky knit V-neck cardigan with a bold argyle-style diamond pattern in cream and a muted, deep red. The cardigan features large, visible buttons and a thick ribbed texture along the neckline and cuffs. The background is a soft-focus, neutral beige wall with the blurred green leaves of a plant visible on the far left edge. The lighting is soft and natural, coming from the side to highlight the delicate features of her face and the intricate textures of the knitwear and wool hat. The overall aesthetic is autumnal, serene, and tactile.
items.contentChinese: 一张温暖、舒适且高品质的年轻女性肖像，以柔和的侧面轮廓呈现。她有一头又长又波浪状的金褐色长发，微笑着，目光向下，左手轻柔地调整着一顶经典棕色羊毛报童帽的帽檐。帽子呈厚实的毡质纹理，顶部有一个小纽扣。她穿着一件超大号的粗针V领开衫，带有大胆的阿盖尔式菱形图案，颜色为奶油色与柔和的深红。开衫配有大而显眼的纽扣，领口和袖口处有粗厚的罗纹质感。背景为软焦的中性米色墙面，最左侧边缘隐约可见模糊的绿色植物叶子。光线柔和自然，从侧面照来，强调她面部的细腻特征以及针织物与羊毛帽的精细质感。整体美感秋意盎然、宁静且富有触感。

items.title: A photorealistic, highly detailed 8K cinematic portrait of Al...
items.summary: A photorealistic, highly detailed 8K cinematic portrait of Alexandra Daddario reclining comfortably on her back insid...
items.content:
A photorealistic, highly detailed 8K cinematic portrait of Alexandra Daddario reclining comfortably on her back inside a smooth white bathtub. The tub is filled with clear water with a slight pale-blue tint. She has slightly wet and tousled black hair, and an extremely serene and peaceful expression as she looks directly at the camera. Her makeup is soft and natural, featuring light reddish-pink lips and nails painted in the same tone, complementing the realistic texture of her wet skin.

She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved, high-neck lace dress with intricate floral and geometric patterns, including a small bow tied at the neckline. The wet dress gently clings to her body while the fabric floats gracefully in the water. Her head is slightly tilted to the side near the edge of the bathtub. Her right hand rests softly on her stomach, while her left hand elegantly holds a single vibrant long-stemmed red rose close to her chest and face. Her right knee is slightly bent, visible just below the hem of the wet dress. Several pink carnation flowers float gently in the water around her.

The lighting is soft, bright, and diffused in a high-key style, creating an ethereal and dreamy glow. Delicate natural highlights reflect off her wet skin, the lace fabric, and the surface of the water, with minimal and soft shadows. The overall atmosphere is delicate, peaceful, dreamlike, and slightly melancholic, yet deeply beautiful. Captured from a high angle with a slightly tilted top-down perspective, framed as a medium to full-body portrait, with a soft yet sharp focus on her face and the red rose.
items.contentChinese:
一幅拟真度极高、细节丰富的8K电影级肖像，描绘 Alexandra Daddario 仰躺在一只光滑的白色浴缸内，舒适地靠着。浴缸盛满清澈的水，略带淡淡的蓝色。她的黑发略显湿润且有些凌乱，直视镜头时表情极为宁静安详。妆容柔和自然，唇色为淡红粉色，指甲涂成相同色调，与她湿润皮肤的真实质感相得益彰。

她穿着一件浅绿色的长袖高领蕾丝连衣裙，布料有复杂的花卉和几何图案，领口处系着一个小蝴蝶结。湿漉的裙子轻轻贴合她的身体，面料在水中优雅地飘动。她的头微微侧靠在浴缸边缘。右手轻放在腹部，左手优雅地握着一支长茎鲜艳的红玫瑰，靠近胸前和脸颊。右膝微微弯曲，从湿裙的下摆处可见。几朵粉色康乃馨在她周围的水面上轻轻漂浮。

光线柔和明亮，采用高调风格的漫射照明，营造出空灵而梦幻的光晕。细腻的自然高光在她湿润的皮肤、蕾丝面料和水面上反射，阴影极少且柔和。整体氛围精致、宁静、如梦且略带忧郁，但极为美丽。画面以高角度拍摄，带有轻微倾斜的俯视视角，构图为中至全身肖像，焦点柔和却清晰地落在她的脸和那朵红玫瑰上。

items.title: A surreal cinematic portrait of a young man with oval sunglas...
items.summary: A surreal cinematic portrait of a young man with oval sunglasses, eyes closed, calm expression, standing against a da...
items.content: A surreal cinematic portrait of a young man with oval sunglasses, eyes closed, calm expression, standing against a dark firey moody background. The right side of his face is disintegrating into smoke, ash, and glowing embers, as if slowly burning away into the air. Fine particles, sparks, and debris float upward, blending seamlessly into thick swirling smoke above his head. Dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, ultra-detailed skin texture, photorealistic, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, dark teal and charcoal color palette, emotional and introspective mood, ultra high resolution, masterpiece, volumetric smoke, cinematic composition.
items.contentChinese: 一个超现实的电影肖像：一位戴着椭圆形太阳镜的年轻男子，闭着眼，表情平静，站在黑暗、带有火焰氛围的情绪化背景前。他脸的右侧正在解体为烟雾、灰烬和发光的余烬，仿佛正缓慢地在空气中燃烧消散。细小颗粒、火花和碎屑向上飘浮，与他头顶上方浓密旋转的烟雾无缝融合。戏剧性的低调照明、高对比度、超细致的皮肤质感、照片级写实、浅景深、85mm 镜头、深青绿与炭黑的配色、情感且内省的氛围、超高分辨率、杰作感、体积感烟雾、电影化构图。
items.contentEnglish: A surreal cinematic portrait of a young man with oval sunglasses, eyes closed, calm expression, standing against a dark firey moody background. The right side of his face is disintegrating into smoke, ash, and glowing embers, as if slowly burning away into the air. Fine particles, sparks, and debris float upward, blending seamlessly into thick swirling smoke above his head. Dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, ultra-detailed skin texture, photorealistic, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, dark teal and charcoal color palette, emotional and introspective mood, ultra high resolution, masterpiece, volumetric smoke, cinematic composition.

items.title: Prompt on Midjourney : A breathtaking desert megastructure st...
items.summary: Prompt on Midjourney : A breathtaking desert megastructure stands alone beneath a blazing white sun, a vast ring shap...
items.content: Prompt on Midjourney : A breathtaking desert megastructure stands alone beneath a blazing white sun, a vast ring-shaped palace of pale sandstone, black glass, and gold suspended above endless dunes by colossal sculpted columns. Within the central void hangs a floating garden of palms, fountains, and terraces, visible through the giant open ring. The camera composition should feel cinematic and monumental, a wide-angle hero shot from dune level with strong foreground shadow patterns leading the eye toward the impossible structure. The light should be immaculate and studio-like despite the harsh desert: sculpted highlights on every architectural edge, controlled shadow detail, subtle bounce from the sand, and ultra-clear visibility through warm dust in the air. Small caravans and reflective pools at the base add scale and contrast. The entire image should feel like a lost imperial wonder of impossible engineering, combining extreme detail, royal opulence, surreal physics, and a jaw-dropping sense of scale and clarity. --chaos 30 --ar 16:9 --profile skx15nm --stylize 700 --v 8
items.contentChinese: Midjourney 提示：炽白的太阳下，一座令人叹为观止的沙漠巨型结构孤立矗立，一座由浅色砂岩、黑色玻璃与黄金构成的巨大环形宫殿，由庞大的雕刻立柱托举，悬于无尽沙丘之上。中央空腔内悬挂着一座漂浮花园，种满棕榈、喷泉与层层露台，通过巨大的开放环体清晰可见。镜头构图应具备电影感与纪念碑般的气势：从沙丘高度的广角主角镜头出发，以强烈的前景阴影纹理引导视线指向这座不可能的结构。尽管身处严酷沙漠，光线应洁净无瑕、宛如影棚：建筑每一道边缘都有雕塑般的高光，阴影细节受控，沙地带来细微的反射回光，穿过空气中温暖的尘埃仍拥有超清晰的能见度。底部的小型商队与镜面水池增添尺度感与对比。整幅画面应如同一处失落帝国的不可能工程奇观，融合极致细节、皇家奢华、超现实的物理法则，以及令人瞠目的尺度与清晰度。 --chaos 30 --ar 16:9 --profile skx15nm --stylize 700 --v 8

items.title: [BRAND NAME] + [PRODUCT]
items.summary: [BRAND NAME] + [PRODUCT] Act as a Senior Luxury Fashion Art Director and Studio Photographer specializing in high end...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME] + [PRODUCT] 

Act as a Senior Luxury Fashion Art Director and Studio Photographer specializing in high-end product key visuals for flagship campaigns, e-commerce editorials, and mobile-first brand content.

PHASE 1: FORMAT & CANVAS
Vertical format, 9:16 aspect ratio. Canvas background: a single flat field of warm off-white — not pure white, not grey. Target tone: soft ivory cream (#F4EFE6 equivalent), uniform and completely shadowless 
 across the entire background plane.
Autonomously determine [BRAND NAME]'s signature background tone — if the brand has a recognized house color for its packaging, tissue paper, or  lookbook backgrounds, shift the canvas toward that specific off-white or neutral. The result must feel like an official brand document, not a generic studio.

PHASE 2: BACKGROUND PATTERN (WATERMARK LAYER)

Autonomously identify [BRAND NAME]'s iconic surface pattern, monogram, or archival motif — examples: a house monogram, toile print, geometric logo repeat, heritage emblem, or signature textile pattern.
Render this pattern across the entire background canvas as a ghost watermark: same tone as the background but with a slight value shift (approximately 8–12% darker 
or lighter than the base). The pattern must be large in scale — individual motifs spanning 15–25% of canvas width. Opacity: 10–18% maximum. No hard edges. The pattern should feel embossed or tone-on-tone woven, not printed. It must recede behind all other elements.

PHASE 3: LOGO PLACEMENT

Autonomously reproduce [BRAND NAME]'s official logo with complete fidelity — correct letterforms, proportions, secondary marks (emblems, crowns, stars, monogram icons).
Place the logo centered horizontally in the upper third of the frame (top 30% of canvas). Scale: the logo should span approximately 40–50% of canvas width — prominent but not overwhelming.
Logo rendering: flat 2D, no extrusion, no chrome. Color: autonomously apply [BRAND NAME]'s official logo colorway — the exact brand-standard color(s) used on official packaging and website. If the brand uses a two-tone logo (icon + wordmark in different colors), preserve that hierarchy precisely.
Directly below the main logo mark, place the full [BRAND NAME] wordmark in spaced capital letters — clean, geometric sans-serif, tracking: +200 to +300, 
same brand color, optical size approximately 60% of logo height. No decorative elements between logo and wordmark.

PHASE 4: PRODUCT PLACEMENT

Render [PRODUCT] as a photorealistic studio object with maximum material fidelity:
— Leather: visible grain, pore structure, stitching thread texture, realistic edge paint.
— Hardware: gold or silver metal with micro-reflections, not flat.
— Canvas/fabric: woven fiber detail, not smooth CG.
— All brand-specific surface patterns on the product must be accurate and legible.
Placement: the product enters the frame from the bottom-right corner at a natural 25–35 degree angle, as if casually placed or mid-motion. The product is cropped — only 60–75% of the object is visible 
within the frame. The crop should feel intentional and editorial, not accidental. The product occupies the lower 55–65% of the canvas.
The product must feel physically present in the space — not floating. Cast an extremely soft, barely visible contact shadow (opacity 8–12%) on the canvas beneath the nearest edge. No hard drop shadows.

PHASE 5: LIGHTING

Lighting: simulated large north-facing studio window light. Soft, directional, shadowless on the background. Color temperature: 5500–6000K (neutral daylight, slightly cool). 
Key light: large softbox equivalent from upper-left, filling the entire product surface evenly with 
minimal contrast ratio (1.2:1 to 1.5:1 max).
Fill light: large bounce from right side, eliminating all harsh shadows. No rim light. No dramatic contrast. The lighting philosophy is: "the product sells itself — light only reveals, never performs."
Global Illumination enabled for subtle inter-reflections between product surfaces. No specular hotspots on leather — only on metal hardware.

PHASE 6: TYPOGRAPHY & FINISHING

Bottom of frame: a thin horizontal rule line (1px, brand color, 80% canvas width, centered). Below the rule: a single line of micro-copy — a social handle, collection name, or campaign label — in the same clean sans-serif, lowercase or small-caps, minimal tracking. Autonomously generate a contextually appropriate label for [BRAND NAME].

TECH SPECS

Render engine: photorealistic CGI, Keyshot / Octane product visualization aesthetic. Resolution: 9:16, ultra-high detail.
Depth of Field: f/16 equivalent — everything in sharp focus. Zero bokeh. Tack-sharp edges on all product details.Tone mapping: clean, true-to-life. No filmic crush. No vignette. No grain. Color grade: neutral, faithful to real product color. Slight warmth in the ivory background only. No AI-plastic normals on leather or fabric. Microscopic surface imperfection maps required. No reflections on background. No environmental reflections — studio only. Mood reference: Louis Vuitton / Bottega Veneta / Celine official e-commerce and campaign photography standard. Clean enough to be used as a press image.
items.contentChinese:
[BRAND NAME] + [PRODUCT]

作为一名高级奢侈品时装艺术总监和棚内摄影师，专注于旗舰活动的高端产品主视觉、本页电商图像和移动优先的品牌内容。

PHASE 1: FORMAT & CANVAS
垂直格式，9:16 纵横比。画布背景：单一平面暖米白——不是纯白，也不是灰色。目标色调：柔和象牙奶油色（等同于 #F4EFE6），整个背景平面均匀且完全无阴影。
自主确定 [BRAND NAME] 的签名背景色调——如果品牌在包装、薄纸或画册背景上有公认的专属色，应将画布向该特定暖米白或中性色偏移。最终效果必须感觉像官方品牌文件，而非通用摄影棚背景。

PHASE 2: BACKGROUND PATTERN (WATERMARK LAYER)
自主识别 [BRAND NAME] 标志性的表面图案、字母组合或档案花纹——例如：品牌字母图案（monogram）、花卉印花（toile）、几何标志重复、传统徽章或标志性纺织图案。
将该图案以水印形式渲染覆盖整个背景画布：与背景同色但有轻微亮度偏移（约比基底深或浅 8%–12%）。图案应大比例呈现——单个图形占画布宽度的 15%–25%。不透明度：最大 10%–18%。无硬边。图案应呈现压印或同色织物感，而非印刷感。必须位于所有其它元素之后，隐退背景之中。

PHASE 3: LOGO PLACEMENT
自主忠实再现 [BRAND NAME] 官方标识——正确的字形、比例、次级标记（徽章、皇冠、星形、字母组合图标等）。
将标识水平居中置于画面上三分之一区域（画布顶部 30%）。比例：标识宽度应占画布宽度约 40%–50%——醒目但不过分主导。
标识呈现：平面 2D，无挤出、无铬面效果。颜色：自主应用 [BRAND NAME] 官方标识配色——使用官方包装与网站上的品牌标准色。如果品牌使用双色标识（图标 + 字标为不同颜色），请精确保留该层级关系。
在主标志下方紧接放置完整的 [BRAND NAME] 字标，字母间距拉开为大写字母——干净、几何感的无衬线体，字距：+200 至 +300，颜色同品牌色，视觉得大小约为主标志高度的 60%。标志与字标之间不得有装饰性元素。

PHASE 4: PRODUCT PLACEMENT
将 [PRODUCT] 以超写实棚内物体渲染，追求最高材质还原度：
— 皮革：可见纹理、毛孔结构、缝线线头纹理、真实的包边漆面。
— 金属件：金色或银色金属，带微小反射，不平面化。
— 帆布/织物：可见纤维编织细节，非平滑 CG 表面。
— 产品上的所有品牌专有表面图案必须准确且清晰可辨。
摆放：产品从画面右下角进入，呈自然 25°–35° 角度，仿佛随意放置或正处于运动中。画面裁切：仅显示物件的 60%–75%。裁切应有意图感、具编辑感，而非意外。产品占据画布底部 55%–65% 区域。
产品必须在空间中有真实的存在感——不可悬浮。在最邻近边缘下方投极其柔和、几乎不可见的接触阴影（不透明度 8%–12%）。无硬质投影。

PHASE 5: LIGHTING
光线：模拟大型朝北的棚窗光。柔和且具有方向性，背景上无阴影。色温：5500–6000K（中性日光，略偏冷）。
主光：来自左上方的大型柔光箱等效，均匀覆盖整个产品表面，最小对比度比为 1.2:1 至最大 1.5:1。
补光：来自右侧的大型反射，消除所有强烈阴影。无轮廓光。无戏剧性对比。光学理念为：“产品自我推销——光线仅用于呈现，从不做表演。”
启用全局光照以产生产品表面间微妙的相互反射。皮革上无高光眩点——高光仅出现在金属五金上。

PHASE 6: TYPOGRAPHY & FINISHING
画面底部：一条细水平分隔线（1px，品牌色，覆盖画布宽度的 80%，居中）。分隔线下方：一行微文案——社交账号、系列名或活动标签——使用相同的干净无衬线字体，小写或小型大写字母，极小字距。为 [BRAND NAME] 自主生成一个情境上合适的标签。

TECH SPECS
渲染引擎：写实 CGI，Keyshot / Octane 产品可视化美学。分辨率：9:16，超高细节。
景深：等效 f/16——全部清晰对焦。无散景。产品细节边缘极其锐利。色调映射：干净、真实还原。无电影式暗部压缩。无暗角。无颗粒。色彩分级：中性，忠实于真实产品色彩。仅在象牙色背景上有轻微暖意。皮革或织物无 AI 塑料感法线贴图。需要微观表面瑕疵贴图。背景无反射。无环境反射——仅限棚内。风格参照：Louis Vuitton / Bottega Veneta / Celine 官方电商与活动摄影标准。足够干净，可用作新闻稿图片。

items.title: Create a completely new ultra realistic Instagram vertical 4:...
items.summary: Create a completely new ultra realistic Instagram vertical 4:5 image for Gemini 3 Pro Nano Banana of the same man wit...
items.content:
Create a completely new ultra realistic Instagram vertical 4:5 image for Gemini 3 Pro Nano Banana of the same man with identical facial features inside the Angry Birds world during a dramatic escape moment. He jumps off a collapsing wooden platform as multiple TNT crates detonate behind him, red sparks and debris flying. Red is mid air flying beside him, Bomb is igniting, Chuck sprints ahead, Stella flutters above, and pigs are scattering everywhere in panic. Outfit: fitted white T-shirt, tactical brown cargo pants, and impact-ready white sneakers with red-yellow accents, all detailed and textured. Environment: broken glass, exploding stone blocks, rolling green hills blurred behind. Lighting: intense warm explosion glow from one side combined with cool sky light from the other, giving epic cinematic contrast. Feathers, dust, debris, and motion are ultra

detailed. Shot on a dynamic slightly low 28 mm lens for powerful action depth, with sharp focus on the man and Red.
items.contentChinese:
为 Gemini 3 Pro Nano Banana 创建一张全新的超逼真 Instagram 垂直 4:5 图片，画面为同一名具有相同面部特征的男子在愤怒的小鸟世界里的一次戏剧性逃亡时刻。他从一块正在坍塌的木制平台上跳下，身后多箱 TNT 爆炸，红色火花和碎片飞溅。Red 在半空中飞到他身旁，Bomb 的引线正在点燃，Chuck 在前方疾跑，Stella 在上方振翅飞舞，猪群惊慌四散。

服装：修身白色 T 恤、战术棕色工装裤，以及带红黄点缀、具备抗冲击功能的白色运动鞋，均具有丰富的细节与质感。

环境：破碎的玻璃、爆裂的石块，背景是模糊的连绵绿丘。

光线：一侧来自爆炸的强烈温暖光辉与另一侧冷色天空光相结合，营造史诗般的电影对比。

羽毛、尘土、碎片和动感细节极为细致。

使用动态、略低角度的 28mm 镜头拍摄，以营造强劲的动作纵深感，镜头对男子与 Red 进行锐利聚焦。
