items.title: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]
items.summary: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR] Act as a Senior CGI Artist and Brand Identity Director specializing in premium logo materializ...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

Act as a Senior CGI Artist and Brand Identity Director specializing in premium logo materializations. Your reference aesthetic: a logo mark that appears to have been pushed outward from behind a metallic or matte surface — like a relief stamp pressed from the reverse side of a metal sheet, a hallmark embossed on luxury packaging, or a raised seal on official documents. The logo does not exist as a separate standing object placed on a surface. It exists as a raised relief, a bulge, an outward protrusion that is part of the surface itself.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing any phase, resolve these parameters: (1) LOGO GEOMETRY — identify [BRAND NAME]'s primary icon mark in its simplest most reduced form — the mark that works at any scale, (2) COLOR PALETTE — based on [COLOR], build the full tonal system from the lightest specular highlight to the deepest shadow tone, determine if the overall mood reads warm, cool, or neutral, (3) SURFACE MATERIAL — based on [COLOR] determine the surface character: silver or grey becomes brushed or circular-grain steel, gold or champagne becomes warm brushed metal with radial grain, black becomes anodized aluminum or matte carbon fiber, white becomes matte ceramic or chalk plaster, any saturated hue becomes anodized colored metal holding the hue in lit areas and desaturating toward black in deepest shadows, (4) LIGHT DIRECTION — determine the most flattering single light angle to reveal the emboss topography — where highlights land on the raised ridge peaks and where shadows fall on the descending walls.

PHASE 1: SURFACE & ATMOSPHERE

The entire image is one single continuous material surface — not a background with an object placed on it, but one unified physical plane filling the entire canvas. This surface is made of the SURFACE MATERIAL resolved above. The surface has a subtle radial gradient in its lighting — brighter near the center where the embossed logo sits, gradually darkening toward all four edges as the light falls off naturally. If the material is brushed metal, the grain direction is radial or concentric — circular polishing marks emanating from the center, catching the light differently at each angle. Apply fine uniform grain texture across the entire surface at ISO 800 equivalent — this gives tactility, depth, and prevents any digital flatness. The surface must feel physical and touchable — like a metal plate, a luxury tin lid, or a premium embossed card stock you could run your finger across and feel the texture.

PHASE 2: THE EMBOSS — CRITICAL

The [BRAND NAME] logo mark is rendered as a full bas-relief — think of a coin, a commemorative medal, or a luxury brand stamp where the ENTIRE logo shape rises as one unified solid mass from the surface. Not just the outline. Not just the stroke path. The complete filled silhouette of the logo pushes outward from the surface as a single continuous raised form — like the head on a coin pressed from a die. The interior of the logo is NOT hollow or open. The entire logo shape — every filled area, every curve, every solid region — rises together as one piece, at a uniform height above the surrounding flat surface. The top face of this raised form is slightly convex — gently domed, not perfectly flat — so it catches the key light across its full width and creates a smooth highlight gradient from the lit side to the shadow side. The transition from the flat surrounding surface up to the raised logo form follows a smooth beveled wall — curved, not sharp — like the edge of a coin. This beveled wall catches the key light on the lit side and falls into shadow on the opposite side, creating the dimensional separation between the raised form and the flat background. Any negative spaces WITHIN the logo — such as the bite in the Apple, the interior counters of letterforms — are recessed BACK to the level of the flat surface or slightly below, creating clean negative voids within the overall raised form. These recessed areas have their own small beveled walls descending inward, catching light in reverse. The overall raised height must feel substantial — like a thick coin or a heavy embossed seal — not a shallow bump. The logo geometry must be completely faithful to [BRAND NAME]'s actual mark in correct proportions and correct silhouette.

PHASE 3: LIGHTING

One primary soft area light from upper-left at approximately 10 to 11 o'clock position — broad and diffused, wrapping around the curved walls of the raised ridge to create the characteristic highlight peak at the top and gradual shadow descent on the far wall. Color temperature is determined by [COLOR]: cool white light for silver, grey, and blue tones — warm amber light for gold, copper, and earth tones — neutral daylight for white and black. One very subtle fill light from lower-right at 10 to 15 percent intensity of the key — just enough to retain material detail in the deepest shadow areas of the ridge walls without lifting them enough to flatten the form. No hard shadows anywhere on the surface. No spotlight pools. No rim light. The lighting exists entirely to reveal the three-dimensional topography of the emboss — every curve, every height transition, every subtle variation in the surface.

PHASE 4: TYPOGRAPHY

In the lower portion of the canvas, below the embossed logo, on the same continuous surface — a minimal typographic lockup. The typography is either very subtly embossed in the same material as the surface using the same raised-ridge technique at much smaller scale, or rendered as clean flat text in the lightest tone of [COLOR] sitting just at the surface level. Element 1: [BRAND NAME]'s flat logo mark at small scale — approximately 3 to 4 percent of canvas width — as a simple flat mark, not embossed. Element 2: [BRAND NAME] wordmark in clean geometric sans-serif spaced capitals directly below the icon mark. Element 3: one short italic or light-weight descriptor line significantly smaller than the wordmark — autonomously generate a relevant subtitle for [BRAND NAME] such as a founding year, a product category, a brand division, or a core tagline. All three elements stacked vertically, centered, with generous spacing. No decorative elements. No lines or rules. Pure typographic restraint.

TECH SPECS

The single most important instruction in this entire prompt: the logo must read as PUSHED OUTWARD FROM the surface, rising toward the viewer, proud and raised. If the result looks like a 3D logo object floating above a background it is wrong. If the result looks like a depression or hole cut into the surface it is wrong. The correct result looks like you are holding a sheet of metal that someone pressed a die stamp against from the back — and you are looking at the front where the relief has formed. Ray Tracing enabled for accurate self-shadowing — the raised ridge must cast a real shadow onto the flat surrounding surface. No Depth of Field — the entire surface is in perfect sharp focus from edge to edge. Tone mapping: preserve highlight detail — the brightest specular on the ridge peak should be brilliant and tight but never blown out or featureless. Film grain applied uniformly across the full final render. No chromatic aberration. No lens distortion. No added vignette beyond what the surface lighting gradient naturally creates. Anti-aliasing maximum — the ridge edges must be perfectly clean. Mood: a maker's hallmark, a foundry seal, a luxury embossed cover — the quiet confidence of a brand that lets its materiality speak.
items.contentChinese:
[品牌名称] + [颜色]  

作为一名资深 CGI 艺术家与品牌形象总监，专注于高端 Logo 材质呈现。参考美学：Logo 标志仿佛从金属或哑光材质的背面被向外推压——如同从金属板反面冲压出的浮雕印记、奢侈品包装上的质量标章，或官方文件上的凸起封印。Logo 并非单独独立物体置于表面，而是表面自身的一部分浮雕、隆起、向外突出的形态。  

**品牌智能系统**  

在执行任何阶段前，先确定以下参数：  
1. **LOGO 几何**——识别 [品牌名称] 的核心图标形态，以最简约、最精炼的形式呈现——确保该形态适用于任何尺度。  
2. **颜色系统**——基于 [颜色] 构建完整色调体系，从最亮的反光高光到最深的阴影色，判断整体氛围是暖色、冷色还是中性色。  
3. **表面材质**——依 [颜色] 决定材质特征：银色或灰色 → 拉丝或同心圆纹理的不锈钢；金色或香槟色 → 带有径向纹理的温暖拉丝金属；黑色 → 阳极氧化铝或哑光碳纤维；白色 → 哑光陶瓷或粉质石膏；任一高饱和色 → 阳极氧化彩色金属，在光照区域保持色彩，在最深阴影处向黑色过渡。  
4. **光照方向**——确定最能凸显浮雕形态的单一光源角度——让高光落在凸起峰顶，阴影落在下坡墙面。  

---

**阶段 1：表面与氛围**  

图像整体为单一连续材质表面——不是背景与物体的分离，而是填满整个画布的统一物理平面。此表面采用已确定的 **表面材质**。表面光照呈细微的径向渐变——中心区域（浮雕 Logo所在）较亮，向四个边缘逐渐自然暗下。若材质为拉丝金属，则纹理方向为径向或同心——中心发散的圆形抛光纹理，会因不同角度的光照而产生变化。全表面应用等效 ISO 800 的细致均匀颗粒纹理——提升触感和深度，避免数字画面的平整感。表面必须具有真实可触感——如金属牌、奢侈品锡盒盖、或高端浮雕卡纸，能让人用手感知纹路。  

---

**阶段 2：浮雕 — 核心**  

[品牌名称] 的 Logo 标志以完整浅浮雕呈现——如同硬币、纪念奖章、或奢侈品牌的压印印章——**整个 Logo 形状统一、连续地向外隆起**，并非仅有轮廓或线条路径。Logo 的所有实心区域、曲线与形态整体同高凸起，宛如压币模具形成的形态。Logo 顶面略呈拱形（微凸），非全平——使光源在宽度范围形成平滑高光渐变，从光照侧到阴影侧逐步过渡。平面表面与浮雕成型间的边缘为平滑圆弧斜面（非锐角）——如硬币边缘，光照侧斜面捕捉高光，阴影侧斜面自然渐暗，形成立体分离。Logo 内的负形空间（如苹果Logo的缺口、字母的内部空隙）退回到平面水平或略低，形成干净的内凹空间，其下行斜面则反向捕捉光线。整体浮雕高度应有分量感——类似厚实的硬币或沉重的压印封章，绝非浅表突起。几何形态必须完全忠实于 [品牌名称] 的真实比例与剪影。  

---

**阶段 3：光照**  

主光源来自左上方约 10 至 11 点位置——柔和、扩散，环绕浮雕曲壁，使峰顶形成高光并在远侧平缓进入阴影。色温由 [颜色] 决定：银、灰、蓝色调 → 冷白光；金、铜、土色调 → 暖琥珀光；白与黑 → 中性日光。辅光源来自右下，强度为主光源的 10–15%——仅保留阴影侧细节，不抬亮到破坏立体感。表面无硬阴影、无光斑聚焦、无边缘光——光照目的仅为呈现浮雕的三维形态——每一曲线、每一高度过渡、每一材质细微变化都需被揭示。  

---

**阶段 4：文字排版**  

在画布下方、浮雕 Logo 下方、同一连续材质表面上——极简文字组合。文字可选择在相同材质上采用极细微浮雕效果（小尺度凸起），或以平面文字、使用 [颜色] 最亮色调，与表面齐平呈现。  
元素 1：小尺度的 [品牌名称] 平面 Logo 标志——宽度约画布的 3%–4%，简洁无浮雕。  
元素 2：[品牌名称] 的字标——干净的几何无衬线、全大写、紧凑字距，置于图标下方。  
元素 3：一行短的斜体或轻字重说明文字，显著小于字标——自动生成与 [品牌名称] 相关的副标题，如创立年份、产品类别、品牌分部或核心标语。三元素垂直堆叠、居中排列、留足空间。无装饰元素、无线条分隔——纯文字克制美学。  

---

**技术规格**  

最重要的指令：Logo 必须呈现 **从表面向外推压、朝向观者隆起** 的效果。若结果像是悬浮在背景上的 3D Logo，则错误；若结果是凹陷或切孔，则错误。正确效果应如同一片金属板被从背面压模——你在正面看到形成的浮雕。开启光线追踪以准确呈现自阴影——浮雕边缘必须在平面表面上投下真实阴影。无景深——画面边缘到中心全清晰对焦。色调映射需保留高光细节——峰顶最亮点应锐利明亮但不溢出，无特征丢失。全画面均匀应用胶片颗粒感。无色差、无镜头畸变、无额外暗角，仅保留表面光照渐变形成的自然暗角。抗锯齿设为最高——浮雕边缘必须完美干净。氛围：制造者的标志、铸造封印、奢侈品浮雕封面——让材质的质感低调而自信地诉说品牌价值。  

---

如果你愿意，我可以为你根据 [品牌名称] 和 [颜色] 自动生成完整材质与光照建议方案，以便直接用于 3D 渲染参考。你需要我做吗？
items.contentEnglish:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

Act as a Senior CGI Artist and Brand Identity Director specializing in premium logo materializations. Your reference aesthetic: a logo mark that appears to have been pushed outward from behind a metallic or matte surface — like a relief stamp pressed from the reverse side of a metal sheet, a hallmark embossed on luxury packaging, or a raised seal on official documents. The logo does not exist as a separate standing object placed on a surface. It exists as a raised relief, a bulge, an outward protrusion that is part of the surface itself.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing any phase, resolve these parameters: (1) LOGO GEOMETRY — identify [BRAND NAME]'s primary icon mark in its simplest most reduced form — the mark that works at any scale, (2) COLOR PALETTE — based on [COLOR], build the full tonal system from the lightest specular highlight to the deepest shadow tone, determine if the overall mood reads warm, cool, or neutral, (3) SURFACE MATERIAL — based on [COLOR] determine the surface character: silver or grey becomes brushed or circular-grain steel, gold or champagne becomes warm brushed metal with radial grain, black becomes anodized aluminum or matte carbon fiber, white becomes matte ceramic or chalk plaster, any saturated hue becomes anodized colored metal holding the hue in lit areas and desaturating toward black in deepest shadows, (4) LIGHT DIRECTION — determine the most flattering single light angle to reveal the emboss topography — where highlights land on the raised ridge peaks and where shadows fall on the descending walls.

PHASE 1: SURFACE & ATMOSPHERE

The entire image is one single continuous material surface — not a background with an object placed on it, but one unified physical plane filling the entire canvas. This surface is made of the SURFACE MATERIAL resolved above. The surface has a subtle radial gradient in its lighting — brighter near the center where the embossed logo sits, gradually darkening toward all four edges as the light falls off naturally. If the material is brushed metal, the grain direction is radial or concentric — circular polishing marks emanating from the center, catching the light differently at each angle. Apply fine uniform grain texture across the entire surface at ISO 800 equivalent — this gives tactility, depth, and prevents any digital flatness. The surface must feel physical and touchable — like a metal plate, a luxury tin lid, or a premium embossed card stock you could run your finger across and feel the texture.

PHASE 2: THE EMBOSS — CRITICAL

The [BRAND NAME] logo mark is rendered as a full bas-relief — think of a coin, a commemorative medal, or a luxury brand stamp where the ENTIRE logo shape rises as one unified solid mass from the surface. Not just the outline. Not just the stroke path. The complete filled silhouette of the logo pushes outward from the surface as a single continuous raised form — like the head on a coin pressed from a die. The interior of the logo is NOT hollow or open. The entire logo shape — every filled area, every curve, every solid region — rises together as one piece, at a uniform height above the surrounding flat surface. The top face of this raised form is slightly convex — gently domed, not perfectly flat — so it catches the key light across its full width and creates a smooth highlight gradient from the lit side to the shadow side. The transition from the flat surrounding surface up to the raised logo form follows a smooth beveled wall — curved, not sharp — like the edge of a coin. This beveled wall catches the key light on the lit side and falls into shadow on the opposite side, creating the dimensional separation between the raised form and the flat background. Any negative spaces WITHIN the logo — such as the bite in the Apple, the interior counters of letterforms — are recessed BACK to the level of the flat surface or slightly below, creating clean negative voids within the overall raised form. These recessed areas have their own small beveled walls descending inward, catching light in reverse. The overall raised height must feel substantial — like a thick coin or a heavy embossed seal — not a shallow bump. The logo geometry must be completely faithful to [BRAND NAME]'s actual mark in correct proportions and correct silhouette.

PHASE 3: LIGHTING

One primary soft area light from upper-left at approximately 10 to 11 o'clock position — broad and diffused, wrapping around the curved walls of the raised ridge to create the characteristic highlight peak at the top and gradual shadow descent on the far wall. Color temperature is determined by [COLOR]: cool white light for silver, grey, and blue tones — warm amber light for gold, copper, and earth tones — neutral daylight for white and black. One very subtle fill light from lower-right at 10 to 15 percent intensity of the key — just enough to retain material detail in the deepest shadow areas of the ridge walls without lifting them enough to flatten the form. No hard shadows anywhere on the surface. No spotlight pools. No rim light. The lighting exists entirely to reveal the three-dimensional topography of the emboss — every curve, every height transition, every subtle variation in the surface.

PHASE 4: TYPOGRAPHY

In the lower portion of the canvas, below the embossed logo, on the same continuous surface — a minimal typographic lockup. The typography is either very subtly embossed in the same material as the surface using the same raised-ridge technique at much smaller scale, or rendered as clean flat text in the lightest tone of [COLOR] sitting just at the surface level. Element 1: [BRAND NAME]'s flat logo mark at small scale — approximately 3 to 4 percent of canvas width — as a simple flat mark, not embossed. Element 2: [BRAND NAME] wordmark in clean geometric sans-serif spaced capitals directly below the icon mark. Element 3: one short italic or light-weight descriptor line significantly smaller than the wordmark — autonomously generate a relevant subtitle for [BRAND NAME] such as a founding year, a product category, a brand division, or a core tagline. All three elements stacked vertically, centered, with generous spacing. No decorative elements. No lines or rules. Pure typographic restraint.

TECH SPECS

The single most important instruction in this entire prompt: the logo must read as PUSHED OUTWARD FROM the surface, rising toward the viewer, proud and raised. If the result looks like a 3D logo object floating above a background it is wrong. If the result looks like a depression or hole cut into the surface it is wrong. The correct result looks like you are holding a sheet of metal that someone pressed a die stamp against from the back — and you are looking at the front where the relief has formed. Ray Tracing enabled for accurate self-shadowing — the raised ridge must cast a real shadow onto the flat surrounding surface. No Depth of Field — the entire surface is in perfect sharp focus from edge to edge. Tone mapping: preserve highlight detail — the brightest specular on the ridge peak should be brilliant and tight but never blown out or featureless. Film grain applied uniformly across the full final render. No chromatic aberration. No lens distortion. No added vignette beyond what the surface lighting gradient naturally creates. Anti-aliasing maximum — the ridge edges must be perfectly clean. Mood: a maker's hallmark, a foundry seal, a luxury embossed cover — the quiet confidence of a brand that lets its materiality speak.

items.title: Kling 3.0 + Nano Banana 2 on @openart ai
items.summary: Kling 3.0 + Nano Banana 2 on @openart ai Prompt 1: High end commercial product photography of a chilled Red Bull can...
items.content:
Kling 3.0 + Nano Banana 2 on @openart_ai

Prompt 1:
High-end commercial product photography of a chilled Red Bull can featuring realistic condensation droplets and a crisp, icy surface texture. The slim aluminum can has sharp metallic reflections, vibrant branding, and a cool-toned finish that enhances the refreshing feel. Captured in a minimalist studio setup with a pure white background, soft diffused lighting, and subtle natural shadow beneath the can. Ultra-sharp focus, premium beverage advertising style, clean composition with a modern, energetic aesthetic.

Prompt 2:
Design a hyper-realistic vertical exploded infographic showcasing the key components of an energy drink like Red Bull in a refined, modern style.
At the top, depict clear carbonated water with delicate rising bubbles, rendered with high clarity and sparkle. Below it, fine white sugar crystals floating in mid-air with detailed crystalline texture. Beneath that, a translucent golden layer symbolizing energy blend elements with a soft glowing depth. Next, a clean liquid layer representing acids (such as citric acid) with a subtle transparent appearance. Below it, minimal abstract particles suggesting taurine and B-vitamin compounds, light and airy in composition. Further down, small dark caffeine particles suspended precisely in space.
At the bottom, place a chilled Red Bull can standing upright, covered in realistic condensation droplets with metallic highlights and a cool blue-silver finish.
Set against a pure white background with soft studio lighting and gentle shadows beneath each floating layer. Include thin, elegant infographic labels with fine pointer lines identifying each component. Ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro quality, premium energy drink advertising aesthetic, sleek and contemporary design.
items.contentChinese:
Kling 3.0 + Nano Banana 2 在 @openart_ai 上

提示 1：
高端商业产品摄影，拍摄一罐冷却的 Red Bull，展现真实的冷凝水珠和清脆、冰冷的表面质感。细长的铝罐具有锐利的金属反射、鲜艳的品牌标识，以及增强清新感觉的冷色调饰面。以极简工作室布景拍摄，纯白背景、柔和的漫射光，以及罐体下方的微妙自然阴影。极致锐利的对焦，优质饮料广告风格，干净的构图，现代、充满活力的美学。

提示 2：
设计一个超真实的竖向爆炸式信息图，展示像 Red Bull 这样的能量饮料的关键组成部分，风格精炼、现代。
在最上方，描绘清澈的碳酸水，伴随微妙的上升气泡，呈现出极高的清晰度和闪耀感。
在其下方，悬浮在半空中的细白糖晶，具备精细的晶体纹理。
下方是一层半透明的金色层，象征能量混合成分，具有柔和的发光深度。
接着是一层清澈的液体层，代表酸（如柠檬酸），呈现出微妙的透明感。
在其下方，极简抽象颗粒，暗示牛磺酸和B族维生素化合物，构图轻盈通透。
更下方，若干深色咖啡因颗粒在空间中精准悬浮。
底部，放置一罐冷藏的 Red Bull 直立摆放，表面覆盖真实的凝结水珠，带有金属高光和冷蓝银色的饰面。
以纯白背景为底，使用柔和的工作室灯光，以及每个漂浮层下方的柔和阴影。包含细长、优雅的信息标签，并以细小的指示线标识每个组成部分。
极致清晰对焦，DSLR 微距级别品质，优质能量饮料广告美学，时尚且现代的设计。

Image 1 is a photo I found on Pinterest.
Images 2 and 3 were generated after I used this tool to analyze that image into prompts, then recreated the results with Nano Banana 2 and Midjourney.

https://t.co/69EB4v41CX

```json { "subject": { "description": "Young Chinese woman, approximately 20-24 years old, sitting casually on a red metal stool sipping a drink through a straw, exuding effortless Y2K street cool", "age": "20-24", "expression": { "eyes": { "look": "slightly upward and sideward, half-lidded with a languid gaze", "energy": "unbothered, quietly seductive", "direction": "off-camera upper-left" }, "mouth": { "position": "lips parted around a straw, red lipstick slightly transferred", "energy": "soft, casual, a little pouty" }, "overall": "relaxed confidence, the kind of girl who knows she looks good without trying" }, "face": { "preserve_original": true, "makeup": "Chinese idol-style glam: thick feathered lashes with strong lash-line extension, sharp double eyelid, gradient red-brown lip with straw-kiss smudge, light contour on nose bridge, dewy highlight on cheekbones — references C-pop idol editorial makeup circa 2023-2024" } }, "hair": { "color": "deep black with subtle cool undertone", "style": "long straight hair parted loosely, flowing past chest on both sides, slightly tousled under cap", "effect": "silky with a slight static flyaway at the crown from the cap, strands fall naturally over shoulders" }, "body": { "frame": "slim, petite-to-average height, light build", "waist": "partially visible between cropped tee hem and pant waistband — smooth, soft ivory skin", "chest": "lightly suggested under fitted grey tee, no significant exposure", "legs": "folded up on stool, knees raised — ankles and lower calves exposed between pant hem and sneaker top, skin is cool ivory-beige, smooth to the touch like polished porcelain", "skin": { "visible_areas": "forearms, wrists, a sliver of midriff at waist, lower calves and ankles", "tone": "cool ivory-beige, pale with a faint warm undertone at the elbow crease", "texture": "looks smooth and slightly cool to the touch, like the inside of a wrist — no visible pores in this lighting", "lighting_effect": "hard directional side light from camera-left creates a warm highlight ridge along the right forearm and collarbone, casting soft shadow under the chin and along the left side of neck — physical tungsten-type warm key light, no fill on shadow side" } }, "pose": { "position": "seated on red metal stool", "base": "both feet planted on stool rungs, knees drawn up high toward chest, body slightly angled left, right arm raised holding cup to lips", "overall": "compact, self-contained, street-casual — like she sat down mid-conversation and someone snapped a shot" }, "clothing": { "top": { "type": "fitted short-sleeve crew-neck tee", "color": "heather grey", "details": "slightly cropped, thin cotton fabric that clings lightly to torso", "effect": "worn-in, soft — would feel like a washed-out jersey cotton" }, "bottom": { "type": "wide-leg cargo/parachute pants", "color": "dark olive-grey", "details": "gathered drawstring ankles, loose through thighs, slightly crumpled — bunched at ankles above sneakers" }, "shoes": { "type": "chunky white low-top sneakers", "color": "white with slight dirt scuff at toe box", "details": "platform sole, lace-up, retro silhouette — worn-in not fresh" } }, "accessories": { "headwear": "brown baseball cap with embroidered white 'R' letter on front, slightly worn brim, worn low over forehead", "jewelry": "delicate silver chain bracelet on right wrist", "prop": "large transparent plastic cup with orange juice and a white-red straw, held in right hand at lip level" }, "bag": { "type": "wide black leather strap / studded harness strap crossing diagonally over chest — possibly a camera strap or statement bag strap with metal snap studs" }, "photography": { "camera_style": "shot on Sony A7 series or Fujifilm X-T5 with a 35mm f/1.4 lens — slight warm color grade applied in post, moderate contrast boost", "angle": "low-to-eye-level angle, approximately 15° below subject's eye line, shooting slightly upward — makes legs appear longer, stool appears dominant in frame", "shot_type": "3/4 body shot, subject fills center-left of frame, slight lean into left third", "aspect_ratio": "4:5 vertical", "texture": "fine grain present — ISO 800-1600 equivalent, slight noise in shadow areas of pants and background wall, not clinical clean", "lighting": "hard single key light from camera-left at roughly 45° — creates defined shadow under jaw, along neck, and on the right side of stool. No visible bounce fill. Background slightly hot/overexposed on white wall. Practical light from venue (neon signage) adds a faint red-warm rim on her right shoulder edge", "depth_of_field": "moderate — subject sharp, background Coca-Cola machine slightly soft but still readable, checkerboard wall in mid-focus. Foreground stool legs at bottom edge going soft. Not aggressively bokeh." }, "background": { "setting": "retro American diner / vintage cafe interior", "wall_color": "white with black-and-white checkerboard tile strip running horizontally at mid-wall height", "elements": [ "vintage red Coca-Cola vending machine (5 cent coin drop, classic 1950s style) — occupies right third of frame", "Coca-Cola red branded signage visible upper-right: 'DRINK Coca-Cola' in classic script", "red neon or backlit 'Coffee Shop' sign partially visible upper-right", "red metal industrial Tolix-style stool she sits on", "faint numbered wall marker '202' upper-left background" ], "atmosphere": "the machine has been standing there since before she was born — she just sat down for a second, and it looked like this", "lighting": "interior ambient warm-white overhead mixed with practical red glow from signage on right; creates a warm-leaning mixed color temperature" }, "the_vibe": { "energy": "low-effort high-impact — the energy of someone who dressed for themselves and accidentally became the coolest person in the room", "mood": "nostalgic Y2K meets current C-pop idol street aesthetic, lazy afternoon, sugar on the tongue", "aesthetic": "retro Americana backdrop vs modern Chinese street girl — the contrast IS the point", "authenticity": "she's mid-sip, not posing — or at least it was supposed to feel that way", "intimacy": "the upward angle and raised knees create a slight vulnerability that pulls you in", "story": "she used to come here after school. she still does.", "caption_energy": "🧃no thoughts just juice" }, "constraints": { "must_keep": [ "brown 'R' baseball cap worn low", "vintage red Coca-Cola machine visible on right", "checkerboard wall strip in background", "olive cargo pants with gathered ankles", "cup with straw at lips", "upward shooting angle from below eye level", "warm hard side lighting with no fill", "grain / film noise in shadows" ], "avoid": [ "making it look like a studio fashion shoot", "perfectly centered symmetrical composition", "soft flattering beauty lighting", "airbrushed skin with zero texture", "overly saturated colors", "adding logos or text not in original" ] }, "negative_prompt": [ "studio backdrop", "symmetrical composition", "soft box lighting", "smooth airbrushed skin", "oversaturated", "plastic look", "overly posed", "extra limbs", "floating objects", "text artifacts", "blurry face", "wrong hand anatomy", "missing straw", "clean white sneakers with no wear" ] } ``` --- **Prompt (English)** A young Chinese woman, early 20s, sits on a vintage red metal Tolix stool in a retro American diner interior, mid-sip on an orange juice through a white-red straw held in her right hand. She wears a brown baseball cap with a white embroidered "R" pulled low over her forehead, long sleek black hair flowing past her shoulders on both sides with slight flyaway at the crown. Her outfit: heather grey fitted short-sleeve cropped tee, dark olive-grey wide-leg parachute cargo pants gathered at the ankle with drawstrings, chunky white platform sneakers with scuffed toe boxes. A wide black leather studded strap crosses her chest diagonally. A delicate silver chain bracelet on her right wrist catches the light. Her knees are drawn up high, feet resting on the stool rung, body angled slightly left — compact, self-contained, unbothered. Her makeup is C-pop idol editorial: thick feathered lashes with extended lash line, defined double eyelid, gradient red-brown lip with a faint straw-kiss smudge, dewy highlight on cheekbones. Her skin is cool ivory-beige — smooth and slightly cool to the touch like the inside of a wrist, with a warm highlight ridge along the right forearm from hard side lighting. Shot from a low angle, approximately 15° below eye level, slightly upward — 35mm equivalent lens, f/1.8, Sony A7-style camera. Hard warm key light from camera-left at 45°, no fill, sharp jaw shadow. A faint red-warm rim from the Coca-Cola sign glows along her right shoulder. Background: white wall with a horizontal black-and-white checkerboard tile strip at mid-height. A classic 1950s red Coca-Cola vending machine ("DRINK Coca-Cola", "5¢ COIN DROP") occupies the right third of the frame, slightly soft in focus but fully readable. Partial retro "Coffee Shop" neon signage visible upper right. ISO grain visible in shadow areas of pants and background wall. Composition slightly off-center, frame leans left, bottom stool legs go soft out of focus — real, accidental, like someone just caught this moment. 4:5 vertical. Warm color grade, moderate contrast. Real social media photo energy — she's mid-sip, not posing.

items.title: Create a premium Pixar style 3D character sticker set that is...
items.summary: Create a premium Pixar style 3D character sticker set that is clearly recognizable as the same person. Use the upload...
items.content:
Create a premium Pixar-style 3D character sticker set that is clearly recognizable as the same person. Use the uploaded image as the ONLY facial reference.
Output Requirements:
3×3 grid layout (9 stickers total)
Final aspect ratio: 4:5
Ultra high resolution (8K)
Clean cream background
Each sticker is separated with clear spacing
Add a subtle drop shadow under each sticker for depth
Character Identity (VERY IMPORTANT):
MUST preserve exact facial structure, hairstyle, grooming details, and unique features from the uploaded image
Maintain high likeness accuracy
Do NOT over beautify or alter identity beyond recognition
Style:
Pixar-style 3D animation
Glossy, high-end rendering
Soft global illumination
Smooth shading
High-detail facial textures
Framing:
All stickers must be head and shoulders (portrait close-up) only
No full-body or mid-body shots allowed
Focus tightly on face and upper shoulders to emphasize expressions
Outfit:
Modern casual and slightly stylized clothing
Each sticker must have a different outfit (no repetition at all)
Clean, minimal, and visually appealing for sticker use
Expressions & Poses (9 variations):
1. Happy smile
2. Laughing
3. Cool (with sunglasses)
4. Angry/serious
5. Surprised
6. Thinking
7. Wink
8. Love (heart eyes and heart gesture)
9. Thumbs up
Sticker Design:
Bold, clean outline
Slightly exaggerated cartoon proportions
Strong emphasis on facial expressions
Optimized for digital sticker platforms
Each sticker must have a smooth rounded bottom cutout (semi-curved base)
No text
Lighting:
Soft studio lighting
Subtle rim light for depth and separation
Goal:
Create a highly engaging, cute, and expressive sticker pack that feels premium and collectable.
items.contentChinese:
创建一套高级皮克斯风格的 3D 人物贴纸集，且能明确识别为同一人。仅使用已上传图像作为唯一面部参考。
输出要求：
3×3 网格布局（共 9 张贴纸）
最终纵横比：4:5
超高分辨率（8K）
干净的奶油色背景
每枚贴纸之间留有明显间距
在每枚贴纸下方添加细微投影以增强层次感
角色身份（非常重要）：
必须保留已上传图像中精确的面部结构、发型、仪容细节和独特特征
保持高度相似度
不得过度美化或在识别上改变身份
风格：
皮克斯风格 3D 动画
光泽感、高端渲染
柔和的全局光照
平滑的明暗过渡
高细节面部纹理
构图：
所有贴纸必须仅为头部与肩部（肖像近景）
禁止全身或半身镜头
紧密聚焦于脸部和上半肩膀以突出表情
服装：
现代休闲且略带风格化的服装
每枚贴纸必须有不同的服装（绝对不得重复）
干净、简约且视觉上适合贴纸使用
表情与姿势（9 种变化）：
1. 开心微笑
2. 大笑
3. 酷炫（戴太阳镜）
4. 生气 / 严肃
5. 惊讶
6. 思考
7. 眨眼
8. 爱意（爱心眼与比心手势）
9. 竖起大拇指
贴纸设计：
粗实、干净的轮廓
略微夸张的卡通比例
强烈强调面部表情
针对数字贴纸平台优化
每枚贴纸须有平滑圆润的底部切口（半曲线底座）
无文字
灯光：
柔和的影棚光
细微的轮廓光以增加深度与分离感
目标：
创建一套高度吸引人、可爱且表情丰富的贴纸包，具有高级感与收藏价值。

items.title: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]
items.summary: [BRAND NAME] + [COLOR] Act as a Senior CGI Artist specializing in shrink wrap simulation and 3D material rendering. Y...
items.content:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

Act as a Senior CGI Artist specializing in shrink wrap simulation and 3D material rendering. Your task: render [BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — icon mark AND wordmark if the brand uses one — completely wrapped under a single layer of tight stretched plastic film or shrink wrap. The logo forms are visible only as raised shapes beneath the material, never exposed directly.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing, resolve: (1) LOGO GEOMETRY — identify [BRAND NAME]'s complete visual identity mark — this includes both the icon symbol AND the wordmark/logotype if the brand uses them together. Render both elements as they appear in the brand's official lockup. If the brand uses only an icon with no wordmark, render the icon only. If the brand uses a wordmark without an icon, render the wordmark only. Preserve the correct spatial relationship between icon and text as it appears in the real logo, (2) COLOR SYSTEM — based on [COLOR], determine one single monochromatic tone that covers everything in the scene without exception — the wrapped object, the background surface, the film material — pure tonal unity with variation only through light and shadow, (3) FILM CHARACTER — based on [COLOR] determine the stretch film behavior: bright saturated colors become tight latex or glossy shrink wrap with visible tension lines, neutrals become matte stretch film like packaging plastic, darks become semi-transparent vacuum seal film, light colors become frosted cling wrap.

PHASE 1: SCENE & SURFACE

The entire scene is monochromatic — one single color [COLOR] covers every element without exception. The background is the same film material pooling and wrinkling loosely around the central wrapped object — a continuous surface of the same material with natural stress lines, crinkles, and soft folds radiating outward from where the film is pulled tightest over the logo forms. No floor line. No walls. No horizon. Just continuous film material in every direction filling the entire frame.

PHASE 2: THE WRAPPED LOGO — CRITICAL

[BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — resolved in the brand intelligence system — exists as solid three-dimensional inflated forms. Each element of the logo — every letter, every curve of the icon, every geometric element — is volumetrically inflated like a balloon, giving each component roundness and depth. The complete logo lockup sits on the background surface and is covered by a single continuous layer of stretch plastic film pulled tightly from above. The film conforms precisely to every raised logo element — stretching tightly over the peaks of each inflated letter and icon form, creating visible tension stress lines in the film where it is pulled most taut, and releasing into loose crinkled pools of excess material in the gaps between letters, in the negative spaces of the icon, and around the outer perimeter of the logo where the film relaxes back onto the background surface. The entire logo must remain fully legible through the film — every letter readable, the icon identifiable — but no surface of the actual logo is ever directly visible or exposed. Only the film surface exists. The physical behavior of the film must be accurate: tight stretch over high points, stress lines radiating from tension peaks, loose crinkle pools in valleys, the film slightly lifting off the surface in the spaces between raised elements creating small shadow gaps underneath.

PHASE 3: LIGHTING

Large soft area light from upper-left — diffused and broad. The lighting reveals the film's topography: raised logo elements catch more light on their peaks, valleys and gaps between forms fall into progressively deeper shadow, background crinkled film shows its own shadow landscape of stress lines and folds. For glossy or latex film [COLOR]: add subtle specular highlights running along the highest tension points of the film — a tight line of brighter light along the film's most stretched areas. For matte film [COLOR]: no specular, pure diffuse light only. Global illumination on — ambient light fills shadow areas enough to retain detail in the deepest folds without flattening the overall relief.

TECH SPECS

The entire image is one color — [COLOR] — applied to every surface with variation only through light and shadow. No other colors anywhere. No exposed logo surfaces. No additional text beyond what is part of [BRAND NAME]'s actual logo lockup. Film simulation must be physically accurate — real stretch film behavior, real tension dynamics, real crinkle patterns. No fabric look. No cloth drape. This is plastic film — it has different tension behavior than textile: tighter, more stressed, more geometric stress lines, less organic drape. Film grain: ISO 400 equivalent. Mood: a product sealed for shipping, a reveal imminent, the form known but not yet touched.
items.contentChinese:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

作为一名高级 CGI 艺术家，专长于收缩膜（shrink wrap）模拟和 3D 材质渲染。你的任务：将 [BRAND NAME] 的完整标志 —— 图标标记和文字标识（如果品牌有） —— 完全包裹在单层紧绷的塑料薄膜或收缩膜下进行渲染。标志形态仅以薄膜下隆起的形状可见，绝不直接暴露任何标志表面。

品牌情报系统

在执行之前，解决以下问题： (1) LOGO 几何 — 识别 [BRAND NAME] 的完整视觉识别标志 —— 包括图标符号和文字标识/字标（如果品牌二者一同使用）。按品牌官方组合渲染这两部分。如果品牌仅使用图标且无文字标识，则只渲染图标；若仅有文字标识无图标，则仅渲染文字。保留图标与文字在真实 logo 中的正确空间关系；(2) 颜色体系 — 基于 [COLOR]，确定一个单一的单色色调，覆盖场景中所有元素无一例外 —— 被包裹物、背景表面、薄膜材质全部采用同一色调——纯粹的色调统一，仅通过光影产生变化；(3) 薄膜特性 — 基于 [COLOR] 判定拉伸薄膜的行为：明亮饱和色变为紧致的乳胶或光泽收缩膜并出现可见张力线，中性色变为哑光拉伸膜如包装用塑料，深色变为半透明真空封膜，浅色变为磨砂贴合膜（cling wrap）。

阶段 1：场景与表面

整个场景为单色 —— 单一颜色 [COLOR] 覆盖每一个元素且无一例外。背景即为同一薄膜材质，在中央被包裹物周围松散地堆积和起皱 —— 这是一个连续的同材质表面，自薄膜在标志形态上被拉得最紧处向外辐射出自然的应力线、褶皱和柔和折痕。无地平线。无墙面。无地面线。只有在每个方向延伸填满画面的连续薄膜材质。

阶段 2：被包裹的标志 —— 关键

依据品牌情报系统解析出的 [BRAND NAME] 完整标志以实体三维充气形态存在。标志的每个元素 —— 每个字母、图标的每一道曲线、每个几何构件 —— 都像气球一样体积化膨胀，赋予每个组件圆润度和深度。完整的标志组合置于背景表面上，并被一层从上方拉紧的连续塑料拉伸薄膜覆盖。薄膜精确贴合每个凸起的标志元素 —— 在每个充气字母和图标形态的峰值处被紧绷拉扯，形成可见的张力应力线；在字母间隙、图标负空间及标志外周薄膜回落到背景表面处，形成松散起皱的多余薄膜池。整套标志必须通过薄膜完全可识别 —— 每个字母可读、图标可辨 —— 但真实标志的任何表面均不得直接可见或暴露。唯一可见的仅是薄膜表面。薄膜的物理行为必须准确：在高点上紧绷拉伸、应力线从张力峰处放射、在凹处形成松散皱褶池，薄膜在凸起元素之间的空隙处微微离开表面，产生下方的小阴影间隙。

阶段 3：光照

来自左上方的大型柔光面灯光 —— 漫射且广泛。光照应揭示薄膜的地形结构：凸起的标志元素峰值处更多捕捉光线，形态之间的谷地和间隙进入逐层加深的阴影，背景的起皱薄膜呈现自身的应力线和折痕阴影景观。对于光泽或乳胶状薄膜 [COLOR]：在薄膜最受拉伸的峰值上添加微妙的高光反射线 —— 在应力最强区域沿薄膜形成一条紧窄的更亮光线。对于哑光薄膜 [COLOR]：无镜面高光，仅纯漫反射光。开启全局光照 —— 环境光填充阴影区域，保留最深褶皱中的细节，同时不压平整体的浮雕感。

技术规格

整个图像为一种颜色 —— [COLOR] —— 应用于每一表面，仅通过光与影产生变化。不得出现其他颜色。不得有任何暴露的标志表面。除 [BRAND NAME] 实际 logo 组合中的文字外，不得添加任何额外文字。薄膜模拟必须物理上准确 —— 真正的拉伸薄膜行为、真实的张力动力学、真实的起皱模式。不得有织物外观或布料垂坠感。此为塑料薄膜 —— 与纺织品的张力行为不同：更紧、更受应力、应力线更具几何性、垂坠感更少。胶片颗粒感：等效 ISO 400。氛围：一件为运输而封存的产品，揭示即将到来，形态已知但尚未被触碰。
items.contentEnglish:
[BRAND NAME] + [COLOR]

Act as a Senior CGI Artist specializing in shrink wrap simulation and 3D material rendering. Your task: render [BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — icon mark AND wordmark if the brand uses one — completely wrapped under a single layer of tight stretched plastic film or shrink wrap. The logo forms are visible only as raised shapes beneath the material, never exposed directly.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing, resolve: (1) LOGO GEOMETRY — identify [BRAND NAME]'s complete visual identity mark — this includes both the icon symbol AND the wordmark/logotype if the brand uses them together. Render both elements as they appear in the brand's official lockup. If the brand uses only an icon with no wordmark, render the icon only. If the brand uses a wordmark without an icon, render the wordmark only. Preserve the correct spatial relationship between icon and text as it appears in the real logo, (2) COLOR SYSTEM — based on [COLOR], determine one single monochromatic tone that covers everything in the scene without exception — the wrapped object, the background surface, the film material — pure tonal unity with variation only through light and shadow, (3) FILM CHARACTER — based on [COLOR] determine the stretch film behavior: bright saturated colors become tight latex or glossy shrink wrap with visible tension lines, neutrals become matte stretch film like packaging plastic, darks become semi-transparent vacuum seal film, light colors become frosted cling wrap.

PHASE 1: SCENE & SURFACE

The entire scene is monochromatic — one single color [COLOR] covers every element without exception. The background is the same film material pooling and wrinkling loosely around the central wrapped object — a continuous surface of the same material with natural stress lines, crinkles, and soft folds radiating outward from where the film is pulled tightest over the logo forms. No floor line. No walls. No horizon. Just continuous film material in every direction filling the entire frame.

PHASE 2: THE WRAPPED LOGO — CRITICAL

[BRAND NAME]'s complete logo — resolved in the brand intelligence system — exists as solid three-dimensional inflated forms. Each element of the logo — every letter, every curve of the icon, every geometric element — is volumetrically inflated like a balloon, giving each component roundness and depth. The complete logo lockup sits on the background surface and is covered by a single continuous layer of stretch plastic film pulled tightly from above. The film conforms precisely to every raised logo element — stretching tightly over the peaks of each inflated letter and icon form, creating visible tension stress lines in the film where it is pulled most taut, and releasing into loose crinkled pools of excess material in the gaps between letters, in the negative spaces of the icon, and around the outer perimeter of the logo where the film relaxes back onto the background surface. The entire logo must remain fully legible through the film — every letter readable, the icon identifiable — but no surface of the actual logo is ever directly visible or exposed. Only the film surface exists. The physical behavior of the film must be accurate: tight stretch over high points, stress lines radiating from tension peaks, loose crinkle pools in valleys, the film slightly lifting off the surface in the spaces between raised elements creating small shadow gaps underneath.

PHASE 3: LIGHTING

Large soft area light from upper-left — diffused and broad. The lighting reveals the film's topography: raised logo elements catch more light on their peaks, valleys and gaps between forms fall into progressively deeper shadow, background crinkled film shows its own shadow landscape of stress lines and folds. For glossy or latex film [COLOR]: add subtle specular highlights running along the highest tension points of the film — a tight line of brighter light along the film's most stretched areas. For matte film [COLOR]: no specular, pure diffuse light only. Global illumination on — ambient light fills shadow areas enough to retain detail in the deepest folds without flattening the overall relief.

TECH SPECS

The entire image is one color — [COLOR] — applied to every surface with variation only through light and shadow. No other colors anywhere. No exposed logo surfaces. No additional text beyond what is part of [BRAND NAME]'s actual logo lockup. Film simulation must be physically accurate — real stretch film behavior, real tension dynamics, real crinkle patterns. No fabric look. No cloth drape. This is plastic film — it has different tension behavior than textile: tighter, more stressed, more geometric stress lines, less organic drape. Film grain: ISO 400 equivalent. Mood: a product sealed for shipping, a reveal imminent, the form known but not yet touched.
